metadata.name: GithubStarsIndex
metadata.description: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars，生成 AI 摘要，便于检索。

summary.zh: GitHubStarsIndex 可自动抓取账号全部 Star 仓库，解析 README 并调用 OpenAI 兼容接口生成中英文 AI 摘要与高权重标签，写入 data/stars.json 便于二次开发与检索。支持并发加速、增量更新避免重复消耗，基于 Jinja2 输出 Markdown/HTML 搜索页，并可通过 GitHub Actions 定时运行，同步到 Obsidian Vault 与 GitHub Pages。
summary.en: GitHubStarsIndex automatically harvests all repositories you’ve starred, reads each README, and uses any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (OpenAI/Azure/Ollama) to generate bilingual AI summaries and high-signal tech tags. Results are stored in a data/stars.json index for fast search and downstream tooling. It supports incremental processing to avoid repeated API costs, concurrency to speed up large backlogs, and Jinja2-based rendering to Markdown and an interactive HTML page. GitHub Actions scheduling enables hands-free refresh, with optional syncing to an Obsidian Vault repo and GitHub Pages deployment.
tags_zh: OpenAI 兼容 LLM 摘要

metadata.name: threejs-capacitor-ios-game
metadata.description: A vibe coded mobile point and click adventure game  using agent skills.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供 Three.js + Capacitor（iOS/桌面）3D 项目“参考模板”，核心是给 Claude Code/Codex CLI 的技能脚本与分步提示词：涵盖场景搭建、GLTF/GLB 加载、动画混合与 iOS 集成。并以 assets_index.json 定义角色动画元数据契约（剪辑名、时长、循环、过渡），便于将自制 GLB 快速接入可维护的动画状态机。
summary.en: This repo is a reference/template for building a Three.js + Capacitor (iOS/desktop) 3D experience using AI-assisted workflows. It ships agent “skills” for Claude Code and Codex CLI covering scene setup, GLTF/GLB loading, animation mixing, and Capacitor iOS integration. It also includes the step-by-step prompts used to generate characters, backgrounds, voices, and scenes, plus an assets_index.json that formalizes an animation metadata contract (clip names, durations, loop modes, crossfades) for wiring custom GLB characters into a maintainable animation/state pipeline.
tags_zh: AI 代码代理技能/提示词

metadata.name: gemini-business2api
metadata.description: OpenAI-compatible API for Gemini Business with multi-account load balancing and multimodal capabilities (image/video generation, file parsing) | 将 Gemini Business 转为 OpenAI 兼容接口，支持多账户负载均衡及多模态能力（图像生成、视频生成、解析文件）

summary.zh: 将 Gemini Business 封装为 OpenAI 兼容 API，便于 ChatGPT 生态工具无改造接入。提供多账号轮询与故障切换、自动注册登录与代理配置，支持百种文件多模态解析，并集成 Imagen 图像与 Veo 视频生成；内置管理面板与 SQLite/PostgreSQL 持久化，适合自建网关与资源池化调度。
summary.en: Gemini Business2API turns Gemini Business into an OpenAI-compatible API, enabling drop-in use with existing OpenAI tooling. It provides multi-account load balancing with rotation and automatic failover, plus automated account onboarding/login and proxy configuration. The gateway supports rich multimodal inputs across 100+ file types (images, PDFs, Office docs, audio, video, code) with streaming responses. It also exposes dedicated Imagen-based image generation and Veo-based video generation, and ships with an admin dashboard and SQLite/PostgreSQL persistence for settings, accounts, and stats.

metadata.name: waoowaoo
metadata.description: 首家工业级全流程 AI 影视生产平台。Industry-first professional AI Agent platform for controllable film & video production. From shorts to live-action with Hollywood-standard workflows.

summary.zh: 面向短剧/漫剧的工业级AI影视Studio：从小说解析到分镜、角色/场景一致性生成、配音与视频合成全流程可控协作，Docker一键部署，适用于虚拟制片与快速内容生产。
summary.en: An AI film-production studio for short dramas and comic videos, providing an end-to-end, controllable pipeline: novel/script analysis, automatic storyboard generation, consistent character and scene image creation, multi-role voice synthesis, and final video composition. It’s designed to mimic a professional “virtual production set” workflow, enabling faster iteration from text to finished episodes. The system is containerized for quick local deployment via Docker Compose, and includes a settings center to integrate external AI model APIs for text, image, and voice generation.

metadata.name: x-feed-digest
metadata.description: Transform your X/Twitter following list into AI-curated daily digest

summary.zh: 开源工具：上传关注列表CSV，调用Grok抓取近24h推文并并发批处理，交由Claude以编辑级Prompt生成分类日报；FastAPI+Vue3提供进度、任务历史与推文下载，适合研究、产品与投资团队应对信息过载。
summary.en: X Feed Digest is an open-source pipeline that turns your X/Twitter following list into an AI-curated daily brief. Upload an exported CSV, then it pulls the past 24 hours of tweets via Grok (OpenAI-compatible API) using concurrent batching for speed and resilience. Collected content is summarized and structured by Claude with editorial-grade prompts into highlights, categories, and a rated tweet list. A FastAPI backend plus a Vue 3/TypeScript UI provides live progress, job history, and downloadable tweet archives.

metadata.name: playwright-skill
metadata.description: Claude Code Skill for browser automation with Playwright. Model-invoked - Claude autonomously writes and executes custom automation for testing and validation.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供 Claude Code 技能/插件，使模型按需生成并执行 Playwright 脚本，实现可视化端到端测试、验证与多步浏览器流程自动化。通用执行器规避模块解析问题，API 文档渐进式加载，配套安全临时文件清理与常用辅助函数，提升稳定性与可维护性。
summary.en: This repo ships a Claude Code Skill packaged as a plugin that lets Claude generate and run Playwright automation on demand. It targets everything from quick page checks to complex end‑to‑end multi-step flows for testing and validation, with a visible browser by default. A universal executor avoids common Node module-resolution pitfalls, while progressive disclosure loads only the needed API reference. Smart temp-file cleanup and optional helpers improve reliability and keep custom, model-written scripts maintainable.

metadata.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
metadata.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供单文件 CLAUDE.md（可作为 Claude Code 插件）规范，用四条原则纠正 LLM 编程常见失误：先思考再编码、以简为先、外科式改动、以可验证目标驱动（测试/成功标准）。适用于团队将 AI 编码纳入流程，减少错误假设、过度抽象与无关改动，提升可控性与交付质量。
summary.en: This repo ships a single CLAUDE.md (also installable as a Claude Code plugin) that hardens LLM coding behavior using four principles: think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, and goal-driven execution with explicit success criteria and tests. It targets common failure modes like silent assumptions, overengineering, and collateral edits. Ideal for teams operationalizing AI-assisted development to improve reliability, maintainability, and reviewability of generated code.

metadata.name: Practical-Guide-to-Context-Engineering
metadata.description: 大模型应用开发的方向，上下文工程是设计原则，Agent Harness 是构建目标，本项目的目标，是为开发者和研究者提供一份大模型应用开发的骨架思路

summary.zh: 面向LLM应用的上下文工程实践指南，拆解七类上下文并映射Agent模块。强调窗口受限下检索与组织最相关信息，区分RAG与提示词工程，给出后端设计骨架与典型场景，并讨论工具调用、记忆与历史管理。
summary.en: A practical guide to Context Engineering for building LLM applications. It formalizes the idea of selecting, structuring, and injecting only the most task-relevant information into a limited context window. The repo breaks context into seven types and maps them to concrete Agent modules, clarifying how relevant context differs from user memory and how RAG is only a subset of the broader system. It also outlines backend design patterns, tool definitions/outputs, conversation history management, and structured output constraints with real-world examples.

metadata.name: get-shit-done
metadata.description: A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES.

summary.zh: GSD 是面向 Claude Code 等 CLI 的轻量元提示与上下文工程工具，通过规格驱动流程、XML 提示、子代理编排与状态管理抑制 context rot，让需求→计划→实现→验证更稳定可重复，适合独立开发者与快速迭代产品。
summary.en: GSD is a lightweight meta-prompting and context-engineering system for Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, and Codex. It targets “context rot” by structuring work as spec-driven development: capturing intent, generating executable plans, implementing changes, and verifying outcomes with consistent prompt formatting (XML), sub-agent orchestration, and state management. The result is more reliable AI-assisted coding at scale—less drift, fewer regressions, and clearer end-to-end traceability from requirements to tests—optimized for solo builders and fast product iteration.

metadata.name: superpowers
metadata.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

summary.zh: Superpowers是面向编码代理的技能化开发方法：对话澄清需求→分段设计确认→可执行任务计划→git worktree隔离→子代理逐项实现。强制红绿TDD、YAGNI/DRY与两阶段评审，适用于Claude/Cursor/Codex等自动化交付。
summary.en: Superpowers is an agentic skills framework and end-to-end development methodology for coding agents. Instead of jumping straight into code, it elicits a clear spec through conversation, presents a digestible design for approval, then generates a concrete implementation plan with exact files and verification steps. Execution follows subagent-driven development with per-task reviews, uses Git worktrees for isolation, and enforces true red/green TDD plus YAGNI and DRY. It installs as plugins or instructions across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode.

metadata.name: directory-migration-tool
metadata.description: 一个使用符号链接迁移大型目录的 Windows 工具，快速将文件夹迁移到其他磁盘，且保留原路径，使程序正常运行，解决原磁盘空间不足的问题

summary.zh: 面向Windows的大目录迁移工具，借助mklink目录符号链接保持原路径不变；以robocopy镜像复制保留权限并显示进度，支持WPF界面与PowerShell脚本，提供自动回滚、还原/修复及quick-migrate批量模式，专用于磁盘空间不足下的无感搬迁。
summary.en: A Windows directory migration tool designed to relocate large folders to another drive while keeping the original path intact via directory symlinks (mklink /D). It mirrors data with robocopy to preserve ACLs, timestamps, and attributes, and reports real-time progress, speed, and ETA. The project offers both a PowerShell CLI and a modern .NET 8 WPF GUI, plus safety features like path validation, disk space checks, automatic rollback, one-click restore, and a repair mode to rebuild links without copying.

metadata.name: skills-hub
metadata.description: A cross-platform desktop app to manage Agent Skills in one place and sync them to multiple AI coding tools’ global skills directories — “Install once, sync everywhere”.

summary.zh: Skills Hub 是基于 Tauri+React 的跨平台桌面端，用于集中管理 Agent Skills，并以符号链接/目录联接优先、复制兜底，同步到 Cursor、Claude Code 等多种 AI 编码工具的全局技能目录。支持扫描迁移既有技能、从本地或 Git URL 导入（含多技能仓库选择）、按源更新并向复制目标分发，同时自动检测新安装工具并提示同步。
summary.en: Skills Hub is a cross-platform desktop app built with Tauri and React that centralizes Agent Skills management and syncs them to the global skills directories of many AI coding tools. It prefers symlink/junction-based linking for “install once, sync everywhere”, with copy-mode as a fallback. The app can scan installed tools to migrate existing skills into a central repo, import from local folders or Git URLs (including multi-skill repo selection), refresh skills from their sources, and propagate updates to copy-mode targets. It also detects newly installed tools and prompts for syncing.

metadata.name: droid-resource-manager
metadata.description: A desktop manager for MCP, Skills, and Droids resources

summary.zh: Droid Resource Manager 是基于 Electron + React + Vite 的桌面端资源中枢，统一管理 Droids、Skills、MCP、Prompts、Rules。支持资源扫描（~/.factory 与项目 .factory）、初始化刷新缓存、创建/复制与拖拽整理、Skills 编辑与 AI 解读触发、MCP 服务/工具浏览，并提供导入导出与资源市场，适合本地/多项目的 AI 资源治理。
summary.en: Droid Resource Manager is a desktop hub built with Electron, React, and Vite to centrally manage Droids, Skills, MCP, Prompts, and Rules. It scans resources from ~/.factory and per-project .factory, supports manual initialization to refresh cache, enables droid create/clone and drag-and-drop organization, provides skill CRUD with on-demand AI interpretation, and offers MCP service/tool browsing. Import/export, settings, and a resource marketplace make it practical for local and multi-project AI asset governance.

metadata.name: dexter
metadata.description: An autonomous agent for deep financial research

summary.zh: Dexter 是面向深度投研的自主智能体，可将复杂金融问题拆解为研究计划并自动执行，结合实时财报/市场数据与可选网络检索，持续自我反思与校验迭代产出可追溯结论；内置循环检测、步骤上限等安全机制，并提供基于 LangSmith 的评测套件，适用于投研问答、财务分析与研究自动化。
summary.en: Dexter is an autonomous agent purpose-built for deep financial research. It converts complex finance questions into step-by-step plans, executes them with tool selection, and refines answers through self-reflection and self-validation. The agent integrates real-time financial statements and market data, with optional web search for broader context. Safety controls such as loop detection and step limits prevent runaway execution. It also includes an evaluation suite using LangSmith tracking and LLM-as-a-judge scoring, making it suitable for repeatable, data-backed research workflows.

metadata.name: pyCapCut
metadata.description: A lightweight, flexible, and easy-to-use Python tool for generating and exporting CapCut drafts to build fully automated video editing/remix pipelines! Another similar project: https://github.com/GuanYixuan/pyJianYingDraft

summary.zh: pyCapCut 是面向 CapCut 的 Python 草稿生成与导出库：加载/复制模板 draft_content.json，替换素材与文本，编排多轨道、转场、特效、关键帧和 SRT 字幕，并驱动批量导出。适合自动化剪辑、混剪与内容工厂流水线，提供素材元数据提取与易用 API。
summary.en: pyCapCut is a Python library for programmatically generating and exporting CapCut drafts, enabling fully automated editing and remix pipelines. It supports template-driven workflows by loading and duplicating existing draft_content.json files, then replacing media assets and text while preserving complex styling. You can build timelines with multi-tracks, transitions, effects, filters, animations, keyframes, stickers, audio controls, and SRT subtitle import. It also offers material metadata inspection (resource_id) for reusable assets. Drafts can be authored cross-platform, but export is done via Windows CapCut.

metadata.name: MiniMax-MCP
metadata.description: Official MiniMax Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables interaction with powerful Text to Speech, image generation and video generation APIs.

summary.zh: MiniMax 官方 MCP 服务器，遵循 Model Context Protocol 将语音合成、图像与视频生成 API 封装为标准化工具，供 Claude/IDE 等 MCP 客户端统一调用；提供鉴权、参数校验与可编排的多模态工作流能力，便于快速搭建内容生成与自动化代理应用。
summary.en: Official MiniMax MCP server that implements the Model Context Protocol to expose MiniMax Text-to-Speech, image generation, and video generation APIs as standardized tools. It lets any MCP-compatible client (e.g., desktop assistants or IDE agents) discover and invoke multimodal capabilities through a consistent schema, while handling authentication, request/response validation, and tool orchestration. Ideal for building agent workflows that generate voiceovers, images, and videos, and for integrating MiniMax’s multimodal stack into existing LLM toolchains with minimal glue code.

metadata.name: mossx
metadata.description: 下一代VibeCoding平台

summary.zh: MossX开源VibeCoding平台，支持多模型与多端接入（桌面、VS Code/JetBrains、移动）。内置聊天、Git/文件管理、终端及可交互并行AI面板，并以AI Memory、OpenSpec扩展生态，提升协作编码效率。
summary.en: MossX is an open-source, next‑gen VibeCoding platform inspired by CodexMonitor. It integrates multiple coding AIs (e.g., Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode) and works across desktop, VS Code, JetBrains IDEs, and mobile. Beyond chat sessions, it provides sidebar Git and file management with in-place editing, terminal/CLI views, and a standout panel mode that runs truly parallel tasks with interactive AI panels. An extensible ecosystem (AI Memory, OpenSpec, spec‑kit) aims to accelerate collaborative software delivery.

metadata.name: claude-code-best-practice
metadata.description: from vibe coding to agentic engineering - practice makes claude perfect

summary.zh: 汇总 Claude Code 实战最佳实践与隐藏参考，覆盖 Skills/Agents/Memory/Rules/Hooks/MCP 等扩展机制；提供命令、settings.json 与各类 frontmatter 全量报告，指导用 CLAUDE.md 与可复用工作流提升提示质量、权限控制与长期可维护性。
summary.en: A hands-on best-practice repository for Claude Code, focusing on how to structure and scale real workflows. It explains core extension building blocks—Skills, Agents/subagents, Memory (CLAUDE.md), modular Rules, Hooks, MCP servers, and plugins—and links to frequently updated “hidden gem” reports. The repo also offers comprehensive references for slash commands, settings.json, and frontmatter schemas, helping teams standardize invocation, permissions, and repeatable automation while keeping context files lean and maintainable over time.

metadata.name: cloudflare_temp_email
metadata.description: CloudFlare free temp domain email 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot

summary.zh: 基于 Cloudflare Workers/Pages 免费搭建临时域名邮箱，支持收发信、附件、IMAP/SMTP 接入与 TelegramBot 通知；采用 Rust+WASM 解析邮件，性能高延迟低，配套多语言响应式 Web 界面，并可为单个地址启用独立密码增强安全。
summary.en: A full-featured temporary email service built on Cloudflare’s free Workers/Pages stack, enabling zero-cost deployment of a temp-domain mailbox. It supports sending/receiving emails, attachments, IMAP/SMTP access for mail clients, and Telegram Bot notifications for real-time alerts. Mail parsing is implemented with Rust + WASM for fast, efficient processing. The project also provides a modern, responsive, multilingual web UI, and can enable per-address passwords to improve isolation and security when sharing or rotating inboxes.

metadata.name: sanshu
metadata.description: 这是一个集百家的二进制MCP，高效、简单、开源是核心。三术MCP

summary.zh: 三术是 Rust 打造的跨平台二进制 MCP 工具集，面向 AI 辅助编程。以智/记/搜为核心：交互式决策与多模态输入、全局记忆与智能去重、语义搜索+增量索引/文件监听；并集成 Context7 文档查询、图标工坊与 UI/UX 生成等能力。适合任何支持 MCP 的助手或 IDE 快速接入，构建从被动问答到主动协作的开发工作流。
summary.en: Sanshu is a cross-platform Rust binary that packages a suite of MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools for AI-assisted programming. It centers on three modules: zhi for interactive decisions and multimodal inputs, ji for global memory with categorization and deduplication, and sou for semantic search with incremental indexing and file watching. It also integrates Context7 documentation lookup plus built-in icon and UI/UX utilities. Ideal for MCP-compatible assistants/IDEs to enable proactive, workflow-oriented collaboration beyond simple Q&A.

metadata.name: awesome-rsshub-routes
metadata.description: 🎯 精选 RSSHub 实用路由推荐，让你的 RSS 阅读更高效！

summary.zh: 精选高实用 RSS 源与 RSSHub 路由清单，覆盖 AI、技术社区、新闻媒体、安全等高频信息场景。提供在线站点可搜索、按分类筛选并一键复制订阅链接，同时附 OPML 文件支持一键导入到各类 RSS 阅读器，显著降低订阅配置成本，提升信息获取效率与信噪比。
summary.en: A curated, high-signal collection of practical RSS feeds and RSSHub routes for efficient reading. It combines native (official) RSS sources with RSSHub-generated feeds, organized by domains such as AI, tech communities, news, security, and more. The companion website supports searching, category filtering, and one-click copying of feed links for fast subscription. It also ships an OPML bundle for one-click import into popular RSS readers, reducing setup friction while improving information quality and coverage.

metadata.name: oh-my-claudecode
metadata.description: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code

summary.zh: 面向团队的 Claude Code 多智能体编排插件，提供 Team 分阶段流水线（plan→prd→exec→verify→fix）与 autopilot 零学习指令。支持在 tmux 中按需拉起 Codex/Gemini/Claude CLI 工作者并行协作，自动收敛到可验证的代码变更，适合修错、评审与交付加速。
summary.en: oh-my-claudecode is a teams-first multi-agent orchestration layer for Claude Code with near-zero setup and a “just use commands” workflow. Its canonical Team mode runs a staged pipeline (plan → PRD → exec → verify → fix loop) to converge on validated code changes. From v4.4.0+, it can spawn real Codex, Gemini, and Claude CLI workers inside tmux split panes for parallel review, security analysis, UI/UX work, and implementation. Ideal for accelerating collaborative debugging, refactors, and delivery.
tags_zh: tmux 并行 CLI 工作者

metadata.name: GoSubTTS
metadata.description: 一款打开即用的具有配音生成、字幕提取等功能的桌面app

summary.zh: GoSubTTS 是基于 Go+Wails 的跨平台桌面工具，离线集成 Whisper.cpp 字幕提取与 EdgeTTS 高质量配音，并可同步生成时间轴精准的 SRT。内置 FFmpeg 支持多格式导入，Windows 自动启用 CUDA、macOS 支持 Metal 加速，零依赖拖拽即用，适合剪辑配音与本地转写场景。
summary.en: GoSubTTS is a cross-platform desktop app built with Go and Wails, designed for plug-and-play voiceover generation and subtitle extraction. It integrates Microsoft Edge TTS for high-quality multilingual speech synthesis without API keys, while producing perfectly aligned SRT subtitles. For transcription, it bundles whisper.cpp for fully offline ASR with strong performance, supporting CUDA acceleration on Windows and Metal on Apple Silicon. Built-in FFmpeg enables direct import of common audio/video formats, prioritizing privacy and zero-configuration workflows.

metadata.name: grok-skill
metadata.description: Codex skill: aggressive web research via OpenAI-compatible Grok endpoint (2api)

summary.zh: 面向Codex/Claude的联网检索技能，基于OpenAI兼容的Grok(2api)端点做实时网页搜索，输出结构化答案与来源链接。提供一键安装、环境变量配置及本地密钥覆盖，适合版本核对、文档查询和故障排查。
summary.en: A Codex/Claude skill for aggressive web research using an OpenAI-compatible Grok (2api) endpoint. It performs real-time web searches and returns structured JSON with a synthesized answer plus cited source URLs/titles, making it ideal for version checks, documentation lookups, and troubleshooting. The repo includes a one-click PowerShell installer, interactive/manual configuration, environment-variable support, and a gitignored local config for safely overriding API keys and headers. Timeouts, extra request bodies, and custom headers are configurable for different gateways.

metadata.name: openclaw-mini
metadata.description: 🦞 OpenClaw 核心架构的极简复现，涵盖 sessionKey 会话域、队列串行、工具化记忆检索、按需上下文加载、可扩展技能与主动心跳唤醒机制

summary.zh: TypeScript极简复刻OpenClaw核心：双层Agent Loop+EventStream、JSONL会话域与队列串行、按需上下文加载/裁剪/摘要压缩，外加长期记忆检索、技能触发与心跳主动唤醒，适合学习并搭建可扩展Agent骨架。
summary.en: OpenClaw Mini is a minimal TypeScript re-implementation of OpenClaw’s core agent architecture for system-level learning. It goes beyond a simple agent loop by providing a dual-loop execution model with a typed EventStream, JSONL session persistence with session-key scoping, and a command queue for per-session serialization. It also demonstrates on-demand context loading, multi-stage pruning and adaptive compaction, tool abstractions, long-term memory retrieval, skill triggering, and a heartbeat-based proactive wake scheduler, plus multi-provider LLM adapters.
tags_zh: 上下文裁剪与摘要压缩

metadata.name: universal-db-mcp
metadata.description: 通用数据库 MCP 连接器：支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、Oracle、MongoDB 等 17 种数据库，支持 Claude Desktop、Cursor、Windsurf、VS Code、ChatGPT 等 50+ 平台，用自然语言查询和分析数据

summary.zh: Universal DB MCP 是面向 AI 助手的通用数据库连接器，基于 MCP 与 HTTP API 让用户用自然语言跨 17 种数据库查询分析。提供 stdio/http 双启动与 SSE/Streamable HTTP/REST 多通道接入，默认只读、脱敏与 Schema 缓存/批量拉取将大库元数据检索提速至 100×，并增强表注释与隐式关系提升 Text2SQL 准确率，适配 55+ 客户端。
summary.en: Universal DB MCP is a universal database connector for AI assistants, exposing databases via MCP and an HTTP API so users can query and analyze data in natural language across 17 engines. It supports stdio/http modes and multiple transports (MCP stdio, SSE, Streamable HTTP, REST). Security features include read-only by default and automatic sensitive-data masking. Performance is boosted with schema caching and batched metadata fetching (up to 100× faster), plus schema enrichment (comments and inferred relations) to improve Text2SQL accuracy. Works with 55+ clients.

metadata.name: GrokSearch
metadata.description: Integrate Grok's powerful real-time search capabilities into Claude via the MCP protocol!

summary.zh: 基于 FastMCP 的 MCP 服务器，将 Grok（OpenAI 兼容）实时搜索/抓取能力接入 Claude/Claude Code。提供结构化 JSON 结果、平台定向搜索、配置自检、模型切换与工具路由控制，可用于突破知识截止、文档检索与事实核查。
summary.en: GrokSearch is a FastMCP-based Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that brings Grok-style, OpenAI-compatible real-time web search and page fetching into Claude and Claude Code. It returns AI-friendly structured JSON (title, link, summary), supports platform-scoped searches (e.g., Twitter/Reddit/GitHub), and includes config diagnostics with safe key masking. It also enables persistent model switching and tool routing to disable built-in WebSearch/WebFetch, improving freshness, citation, and fact-checking workflows.

metadata.name: Trellis
metadata.description: The best agent harness.

summary.zh: Trellis 面向 Claude Code/Cursor 等的一体化 AI 编程框架：Markdown 规范库自动注入并更新；基于 Git worktree 启动并行会话，工作痕迹持久化到仓库，支持团队共享最佳实践与一致交付。
summary.en: Trellis is an all-in-one AI engineering framework and CLI toolkit for Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex, and more. It auto-injects your Markdown specs and workflows into every session, turning best practices into a living, auto-updated spec library. Trellis also enables parallel agent sessions via isolated Git worktrees, while persisting traces and context inside your repo for continuity. With team sync, one developer’s patterns become shared standards across the codebase.

summary.zh: baoyu-skills是Claude Code可安装技能集，支持小红书信息图、封面/漫画/幻灯片生成，并可一键发布到X与微信；同时提供图像生成后端及URL转Markdown、压缩、格式化等工具，提升内容生产与分发效率。
summary.en: baoyu-skills is an installable skill set for Claude Code, delivered as marketplace plugins in a Node.js environment (npx/bun). It streamlines content production with generators for RedNote (Xiaohongshu) infographic series, cover images, comics, and slide decks, plus publishing helpers for X and WeChat. It also bundles AI generation backends and practical utilities such as URL-to-Markdown conversion, image compression, and Markdown formatting. A style × layout system enables fast, consistent visual outputs.

metadata.name: QuantDinger
metadata.description: Open-source AI-driven quantitative trading platform for crypto, stocks, and forex with backtesting, live trading, market data, and multi-agent research.

summary.zh: QuantDinger 是本地优先的 AI 原生量化交易平台，覆盖研究、回测到实盘执行。通过多智能体将自然语言想法自动生成 Python 策略并一键回测、下单，面向零代码与专业用户。支持 10+ 交易所/经纪商，Docker 两分钟自建部署，API Key 与策略全程留在自有服务器，强调隐私与可控性。
summary.en: QuantDinger is an AI-native, local-first quantitative trading platform spanning research, backtesting, and live execution. It uses multiple AI agents to turn natural-language trading ideas into Python strategies, then run backtests and place live orders with minimal friction—great for both non-coders and quants. The system supports 10+ exchanges/brokers and is easy to self-host via Docker. A privacy-first design keeps API keys and strategies on your own machine/server, improving security, control, and reproducibility.

metadata.name: huobao-drama
metadata.description: 🎬 火宝短剧 - 基于AI的一站式短剧生成平台 《一句话生成完整短剧，从剧本到成片全自动化》  Huobao Drama - An AI-Powered End-to-End Short Drama Generator "One Sentence to Complete Drama: Fully Automated from Script to Final Video"

summary.zh: 火宝短剧是基于Go+Vue3的AIGC短剧生产平台，利用LLM将一句话/剧本解析为角色、场景与分镜，并结合文生图、图生视频与FFmpeg自动剪辑合成成片；内置资产库、任务进度与本地存储/SQLite，适用于短剧批量生产、投放素材生成与营销内容自动化。
summary.en: Huobao Drama is an end-to-end AI short drama production platform built with Go (Gin) + Vue 3 and a DDD layered architecture. It turns a single sentence or script into structured characters, scenes, and storyboards via LLM parsing, then generates portraits/backgrounds (text-to-image) and clips (image-to-video / text-to-video), finally composing videos with FFmpeg. The system includes asset library management, import/export, local storage, and task progress tracking, enabling scalable short-drama creation for marketing, rapid prototyping, and batch content production.

metadata.name: skills
metadata.description: Agent skills for Vue 3 development

summary.zh: 面向 Vue 3 开发的 AI 智能体技能库，沉淀真实问题的最佳实践与排错指南，覆盖 Composition API/TypeScript、Vue Router、Pinia、测试、JSX 及可复用 Composable 模式。支持 npx skills 与 Claude 插件安装，并通过“use vue skill”显式触发，提升代码一致性、性能与 SSR 稳定性。
summary.en: An experimental community skill pack for AI agents focused on Vue 3 development. It codifies patterns and edge-case guidance from real issues, covering Composition API + TypeScript best practices, Vue Router 4, Pinia state patterns, testing (Vitest, Vue Test Utils, Playwright), JSX usage, and practical debugging (runtime warnings, async errors, hydration/SSR). Install via `npx skills` or the Claude Code marketplace and explicitly trigger with “use vue skill” to get consistent, higher-quality outputs and reusable composable designs.

metadata.name: XHS_RS_TOOLS
metadata.description: xhs_toolkit for rust

summary.zh: 基于 Rust API 服务 + Python Agent 的小红书 Web 接口逆向与自动化工具集。通过 undetected-chromedriver 容器获取合法访客 Cookie，结合纯算法实时签名，降低对浏览器抓包依赖并对抗 Cookie/Header/X-S 强绑定风控。提供二维码登录、搜索/Feed、笔记详情评论、视频/图片直链解析与下载等能力。
summary.en: XHS-RS-TOOLS is a Rust API backend plus a Python signing agent for reverse-engineering and automating Xiaohongshu (XHS) web endpoints. It uses a Dockerized undetected-chromedriver to bootstrap legitimate guest cookies, then relies on a “pure algorithm” real-time signature service to satisfy strict cookie/header/X-S binding checks with minimal browser usage. The toolkit supports QR login flows, full search and feed crawling, note details and comments, and media extraction for videos and image notes with direct CDN links and server-side downloading.

metadata.name: XHS_Business_Idea_Validator
metadata.description: 小红书收集和分析数据来解析市场需求用户痛点及竞争格局 - 📊 **小红书数据抓取**: 自动抓取相关笔记和评论数据  - 🤖 **AI 内容分析**: 使用 LLM 分析用户痛点和市场需求 - 📄 **自动化报告生成**: 生成专业的市场验证报告

summary.zh: 该智能体以业务创意为关键词抓取小红书笔记与评论，通过LLM提取用户痛点、需求、情绪与竞品线索，并结合评论标签与综合评分自动生成市场验证报告。流程采用编排式多智能体与分阶段checkpoint，便于复跑与迭代分析，适用于新品立项、选品决策、营销洞察与细分赛道调研。
summary.en: An agentic workflow that validates business ideas using Xiaohongshu signals. It scrapes relevant posts and comments from a user-provided query, then applies LLM-driven analysis to extract pain points, unmet needs, sentiment, user feedback, and competitive cues. The system performs post analysis, comment analysis, tag mining, and a combined scoring step, finally producing a structured market validation report. Checkpointed stages and an orchestrated multi-agent pipeline make runs reproducible and easy to iterate for product discovery, niche research, and go-to-market planning.

metadata.name: daily_stock_analysis
metadata.description: LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析器：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

summary.zh: 面向A/H/美股自选股的LLM分析器，聚合多源行情与实时新闻，生成含买卖点、止损目标与检查清单的决策仪表盘；内置策略对话与回测验证，借助GitHub Actions定时执行，并推送到企微/飞书/Telegram/邮箱等渠道，低成本快速部署。
summary.en: An LLM-driven stock analyzer for A-shares, Hong Kong stocks, and US equities. It aggregates multi-source quotes and real-time financial news to produce a decision dashboard with actionable entry/exit levels, stop-loss/targets, and a rule-based checklist. The system includes an interactive “ask-a-strategy” agent (multiple built-in trading methods) plus automated backtesting to validate signal quality. It runs on schedules via GitHub Actions (no server needed) and pushes reports to WeCom, Feishu, Telegram, email, and more.

metadata.name: github-skill-forge
metadata.description: 一个"制造技能的技能"。这个工具自动化了将任意 GitHub 仓库转换为标准化技能的全过程，是扩展 AI Agent 能力的核心工具。

summary.zh: GitHub Skill Forge 通过 GitHub API 零克隆扫描仓库，自动剔除噪声并以 Smart RAG 提炼核心代码与文档，生成 context_bundle.md 与技能目录供 Trae 等 AI Agent 直接调用；内置镜像轮换、多线程抓取及 Stars/活跃度预筛，加速把任意项目转成可复用技能。
summary.en: GitHub Skill Forge automates turning any GitHub repository into a standardized “skill” for AI assistants (e.g., Trae). It scans repos via the GitHub API in a zero-clone, cloud-first mode, then applies smart RAG-style filtering to remove noise and extract the essential code and docs into a compact context_bundle.md plus a ready-to-use skill folder. Built-in API mirror rotation, multi-thread fetching, and basic quality heuristics (stars/activity) help bypass rate limits and avoid low-quality repos.

summary.zh: GudaStudio Commands 为 Claude Code 提供自定义命令集。核心 gudaspec 以 RPI（研究-计划-实现）串联 OpenSpec，并通过 MCP 协同 Codex/Gemini 等模型，面向复杂、长时编码任务。配合分阶段 /clear 手动切分上下文，最大化约80K有效上下文利用率；内置跨平台安装脚本与可复用的完整工作流示例。
summary.en: GudaStudio Commands is a curated set of custom commands for Claude Code. Its flagship workflow, gudaspec, operationalizes the RPI (Research–Plan–Implementation) methodology, integrates OpenSpec outputs, and orchestrates multi-model collaboration via MCP (e.g., Codex and Gemini) to handle complex, long-running coding tasks. The design emphasizes human-in-the-loop context management: users deliberately split stages and clear context between runs to maximize the effective ~80K context budget. The repo includes cross-platform installers and step-by-step usage demos.

metadata.name: eastmoney
metadata.description: VibeAlpha Terminal 是一个专注于中国 A 股市场的智能金融分析平台，集成了基金分析、股票监控、商品追踪和市场情绪分析等功能。通过 AI 大语言模型自动生成专业的盘前/盘后分析报告，帮助投资者做出更明智的决策。

summary.zh: 面向中国A股的智能金融终端，覆盖组合管理、基金池、自选股监控、商品与情绪分析。以AkShare/TuShare取数，APScheduler定时生成盘前/盘后报告并邮件推送，支持Gemini/OpenAI等LLM与中英双语界面。
summary.en: VAlpha Terminal is an AI-powered analytics terminal for China A-shares, combining portfolio management, fund pool analysis, watchlist monitoring, commodities tracking, news aggregation, and market-sentiment signals. It ingests data via AkShare/TuShare with optional caching, and uses APScheduler to automate pre-market and post-market report generation plus email alerts. The system integrates multiple LLM backends (Gemini, OpenAI, and compatible endpoints) to produce professional narratives. Built as a full-stack app with FastAPI and a React/TypeScript dashboard with i18n support.

metadata.name: share
metadata.description: AI股市竞技场

summary.zh: LLM量化交易模拟竞技场：接入股市行情，编排多Agent策略并回放交易；内置提示词模板、模型渠道与对比评测，完整记录接口/交易日志。FastAPI+MySQL/Redis后端，Vite前端，脚本与Compose一键部署。
summary.en: An LLM-driven quantitative trading simulation arena. It connects to stock market quotes, lets you manage multiple trading agents, and replays trades with detailed transaction and API logs. The platform includes prompt templates, model channels, and side-by-side model comparisons to evaluate strategy quality across different LLMs. Built with a FastAPI backend (Python 3.10+) plus MySQL and Redis, and a Vite-based frontend. Cross-platform one-click deploy scripts and Docker Compose simplify local setup and operations.

metadata.name: webnovel-writer
metadata.description: 基于 Claude Code 的长篇网文辅助创作系统，解决 AI 写作中的「遗忘」和「幻觉」问题，支持 200 万字量级 连载创作。

summary.zh: 面向长篇连载网文的 Claude Code 写作助手，以“大纲/设定约束+新实体入库”抑制遗忘与幻觉。通过双 Agent（Context/Data）管理上下文与知识库，叠加 RAG 检索、六维并行审查（含一致性/节奏/OOC等）与追读力规则，支持 200 万字级持续创作与故障恢复。
summary.en: Webnovel Writer is a Claude Code–compatible assistant for long-form serialized fiction (up to ~2M words), designed to reduce LLM “forgetting” and hallucinations. It enforces outline-as-law and canon-as-physics, automatically extracts new entities into a managed knowledge base, and retrieves facts via RAG. A dual-agent design (Context/Data) plus parallel reviewers (consistency, pacing, OOC, coherence, hook payoff) provides continual validation. Python scripts maintain state, indexes, and vectors for durable, recoverable workflows.

metadata.name: ai-global
metadata.description: Unified Config Manager for AI Coding Tools

summary.zh: AI Global 是面向多款 AI 编程助手的统一配置管理器，通过单一 AGENTS.md 与 skills/rules/commands 目录集中维护，并自动为各工具生成符号链接实现同步。支持系统级与项目级双模式自动检测，首跑可扫描工具、合并配置并备份原文件，且可从 GitHub 拉取技能包，适合多工具并行开发与团队规范落地。
summary.en: AI Global is a unified configuration manager for multiple AI coding assistants. It centralizes AGENTS.md and shared skills/rules/commands into one directory, then syncs each supported tool via symlinks. With automatic context detection, it works in both system-wide and per-project modes without manual switching. On first run it scans installed tools, backs up original configs, merges existing assets, and updates links. It can also import skills from GitHub repos, making it ideal for consistent workflows across tools and teams.

metadata.name: PromptX
metadata.description: PromptX 不仅仅是一个提示词存储工具，它是专为 AI 时代打造的生产力神器。采用 UI/UX Pro Max 设计标准，结合强大的 版本管理 和 智能分类，让你的 AI 工作流效率提升 10x。

summary.zh: PromptX 是面向 AI 工作流的提示词管理平台，集成版本管理与差异对比、树形分类与高级标签、全局搜索与一键复制；并提供公共模板库分享/下载、评分评论与审核、WebSocket 实时通知，适合团队沉淀与复用高质量 Prompt。
summary.en: PromptX is a full-stack prompt management platform designed for AI workflows. It combines prompt CRUD with nested categorization, advanced tagging, global search, and one-click copy. Its standout feature is built-in version control with auto snapshots, diff comparison, and rollback. PromptX also includes a community template library for sharing and importing prompts, plus ratings, comments, moderation tools, and real-time WebSocket notifications. Built with FastAPI, MongoDB, and a React/TypeScript frontend, it fits individuals and teams building reusable prompt assets.

metadata.name: all-api-hub
metadata.description: 一站式管理 New API 兼容中转站账号：余额/用量看板、自动签到、密钥一键导出到常用应用、网页内 API 可用性测试、渠道与模型同步/重定向 | New‑API relay manager: balance/usage, auto check‑in, one‑click key export to popular clients, in‑page API checks, channel/model sync & redirect

summary.zh: All API Hub 是面向 New-API/one-api 等中转站的浏览器扩展，集中管理多站点账号余额与用量，支持自动签到、API Key 批量管理与一键导出到常用客户端，并提供模型/接口可用性测试、用量分析、渠道与模型同步及重定向，适合个人与站点管理员降本增效。
summary.en: All API Hub is a browser extension for managing New-API/One-API compatible relay accounts in one place. It aggregates multi-site balances, usage and health status, supports auto check-in, centralized API key management, and one-click exports to popular AI clients and routers. It also provides in-page API/model availability tests, usage analytics with latency views, and admin utilities for self-hosted panels such as channel creation, model sync, and model redirect, reducing repetitive dashboard work.

metadata.name: OpenSpec
metadata.description: Spec-driven development (SDD) for AI coding assistants.

summary.zh: OpenSpec 面向 AI 编码助手的规格驱动开发框架：用 CLI 指令自动生成 proposal、需求场景、设计与任务清单，并以 propose→apply→archive 的工件流闭环实现功能交付。强调迭代、易用与存量代码适配，可扩展到团队/企业；支持 20+ 工具生态，Node.js/NPM 即装即用。
summary.en: OpenSpec is a spec-driven development framework built for AI coding assistants. It provides an artifact-guided workflow that turns an idea into structured deliverables—proposal, requirements/scenarios, design, and an implementation task list—then drives execution via commands like /opsx:propose, /opsx:apply, and /opsx:archive. Designed to be iterative and lightweight, it works well on brownfield codebases and scales from solo projects to teams. Distributed as a Node.js CLI via npm and supports 20+ AI tools.

metadata.name: interactive-prompt-iterator
metadata.description: 交互式提示词优化器 - 基于 Next.js 和 AI SDK 的提示词优化工具

summary.zh: Interactive Prompt Iterator 是基于 Next.js 与 AI SDK 的交互式提示词优化器，通过多轮对话把模糊需求拆解为结构化高质量 Prompt。提供可视化表单、维度化选项、模板管理与一键复用，并支持 PDF/图片解析以处理复杂资料，适合内容创作、需求澄清与AI应用落地场景。
summary.en: Interactive Prompt Iterator is a Next.js + AI SDK web tool that turns vague ideas into structured, high-quality prompts through multi-turn guided dialogue. It accelerates prompt engineering with visual forms, selectable requirement dimensions, and reusable template management for one-click application. The app also supports parsing PDFs and images to incorporate complex source materials into prompt design. It fits workflows such as content creation, requirement clarification, and building reliable AI-assisted products with repeatable prompts.

metadata.name: vue-fabric-editor
metadata.description: 快图设计-基于fabric.js和Vue的开源图片编辑器，可自定义字体、素材、设计模板。fabric.js and Vue based image editor, can customize fonts, materials, design templates.

summary.zh: 快图设计基于Vue与fabric.js的插件化图片编辑器，支持拖拽排版、图层与历史、辅助线标尺、渐变滤镜等；可导入PSD/JSON并导出PNG/SVG/JSON，且可自定义字体、素材、模板以及右键菜单/快捷键，适用于海报制作与商品DIY在线设计。
summary.en: Kuaitu (vue-fabric-editor) is a Vue + Fabric.js based, plugin-driven canvas image editor built for drag-and-drop design rather than a heavy “online PS”. It offers layers, history/undo, guides and rulers, gradients and filters, plus context menus and hotkeys that can be extended via plugins. It imports PSD/JSON and exports PNG/SVG/JSON, and supports custom fonts, assets and templates. Typical use cases include poster/banner creation, template-based marketing creatives, and product/print-on-demand DIY designers.

metadata.name: ccg-workflow
metadata.description: 多模型协作开发系统 - Claude 编排 + Codex 后端 + Gemini 前端，28 个命令覆盖开发全流程，一键安装零配置

summary.zh: CCG 是基于 Claude Code CLI 的多模型协作开发工具集，统一编排 Codex 与 Gemini：Gemini 负责前端、Codex 负责后端，Claude 做智能路由、决策与代码审查。内置 17+ 斜杠命令覆盖规划-执行-测试-Review 与 Git 运维，并封装 OPSX 规范驱动与 Agent Teams 并行实施，通过文件化状态与跨会话执行降低上下文风险。
summary.en: CCG is a multi-model developer workflow toolkit built on Claude Code CLI, orchestrating Codex and Gemini with clear role routing (Gemini for frontend, Codex for backend) while Claude handles decisions and code review. It ships 17+ slash commands spanning planning/execution, debugging, testing, review, and Git operations. It also wraps OPSX spec-driven workflows and Claude Agent Teams for parallel implementation, persisting state to files to enable cross-session execution and reduce context window failure modes.

metadata.name: ui-ux-pro-max-skill
metadata.description: An AI SKILL that provide design intelligence for building professional UI/UX multiple platforms

summary.zh: UI UX Pro Max 是面向多平台的 AI 设计智能技能，内置设计系统生成器与推理引擎，可按需求快速产出信息架构、版式模式、CTA与组件规范；集成100条推理规则与67种UI风格，并提供CLI工作流，提升从产品到落地实现的一致性与效率。
summary.en: UI UX Pro Max is an AI skill that delivers design intelligence for building professional UI/UX across platforms and frameworks. Its core v2.0 capability is a Design System Generator: a reasoning-driven engine that interprets project requirements and outputs a tailored design system, including layout patterns, section structure, CTAs, and style guidance. The repository emphasizes repeatable quality via 100 reasoning rules and 67 curated UI styles, and it ships with CLI tooling (uipro-cli) to integrate design decisions into practical workflows.

metadata.name: Prisma
metadata.description: 基于 Gemini 的可视化多智能体深度推理引擎 | A visual multi-agent deep reasoning engine powered by Gemini, featuring dynamic planning, chain-of-thought visualization, and multi-session management. Built with React 19 + TypeScript + Vite 6.

summary.zh: Prisma 是基于 Gemini 3 的可视化多专家并行推理引擎，以 Manager→Experts→Synthesis 工作流动态拆解复杂问题，并通过递归自省迭代提升结论可靠性。它提供思维链/内部独白与流程节点图实时展示，支持分阶段 Thinking Budget、模型切换与多会话本地存储，适用于复杂分析、方案设计与代码架构推演。
summary.en: Prisma is a visual deep multi-agent reasoning engine built on Google Gemini 3. It decomposes complex queries via a Manager→Experts→Synthesis pipeline, runs specialized experts in parallel, and applies recursive review/refinement to improve rigor. The UI exposes end-to-end reasoning as a live process graph, including expert internal monologues and drafts. It also offers per-stage thinking budgets, Gemini model switching, and local multi-session management—ideal for complex analysis, design decisions, and architecture/code reasoning.

metadata.name: myclaude
metadata.description: Multi-agent orchestration workflow (Claude Code  Codex Gemini OpenCode)

summary.zh: 面向Claude Code的多智能体开发编排系统，提供/do等模块化工作流，支持Codex/Gemini/OpenCode多后端路由执行，覆盖需求→测试→实现→评审全链路，并带npx安装、更新与安全扫描。
summary.en: A Claude Code–centric multi-agent orchestration system for AI-assisted software delivery. It ships modular workflows (/do, /omo, BMAD, SPARV, essentials) to standardize feature development, debugging, and requirements-to-code pipelines. The codeagent wrapper enables multi-backend execution and intelligent routing across Claude, Codex, Gemini, and OpenCode. Installation and updates are streamlined via npx with configurable modules and overwrite-safe upgrades. It also provides security-scanned skill installation plus utilities for PRD scoring, test-case generation, and browser automation.

metadata.name: axonhub
metadata.description: ⚡️ Open-source AI Gateway — Use any SDK to call 100+ LLMs. Built-in failover, load balancing, cost control & end-to-end tracing.

summary.zh: AxonHub 是开源 AI 网关/平台，兼容 OpenAI、Anthropic 等 SDK，通过协议转换实现“任意 SDK 调任意模型”，配置切换即可接入 100+ LLM。内置 <100ms 故障切换与智能负载均衡、实时成本与配额控制、端到端请求追踪及企业级 RBAC，适合多模型生产接入与避免厂商锁定。
summary.en: AxonHub is an open-source AI gateway (Go, Docker-ready) that lets you use any existing SDK—OpenAI, Anthropic, and more—to call 100+ LLMs with zero code changes. It transparently translates API formats so you can switch providers via configuration, reducing vendor lock-in and integration overhead. Built for production, it includes sub-100ms failover, smart load balancing, real-time cost and quota governance with per-request breakdowns, end-to-end tracing for observability, and enterprise-grade RBAC for isolation and control.

metadata.name: Claude-Code-Deep-Research-main
metadata.description: 利用claude code agent框架一步一步实现deep research！很强大很简单的skills。我一步一步介绍实现deep research，因为deep research就是agent框架第一应用，对比一下各个框架实现这个deep research，就知道哪个框架才是真厉害。

summary.zh: 基于Claude Code CLI的多智能体深度调研框架，利用Skills/Commands一键跑通7阶段流程与Graph of Thoughts路径控制，支持并行检索、综合写作与A-E级引用校验，自动产出结构化研究目录与报告。适用于技术选型、行业分析与可复用研究流水线。
summary.en: A multi-agent deep research framework built on Claude Code CLI, reproducing “Deep Research” capabilities via native Skills and Commands. It orchestrates a 7-phase workflow with a Graph of Thoughts controller to manage research paths, launches parallel specialist agents for exploration, and synthesizes outputs into structured reports. A citation validation system rates sources (A–E) and performs verification to improve trustworthiness. Ideal for technical decision-making, market/industry analysis, and repeatable research pipelines that generate organized artifacts under RESEARCH/[topic]/.

metadata.name: KVideo
metadata.description: 一个基于 Next.js 16 构建的现代化视频聚合播放平台。采用独特的 "Liquid Glass" 设计语言，提供流畅的视觉体验和强大的视频搜索功能。

summary.zh: KVideo 基于 Next.js16/React19/Tailwind4 的视频聚合播放平台，以“Liquid Glass”玻璃拟态打造高质交互。支持多源并行搜索（SSE 实时回传）、自定义/订阅源与统一解析；HLS 播放含代理、卡顿检测、PiP、Chromecast；并集成 IPTV(M3U) 代理与豆瓣信息推荐、收藏和历史续播。
summary.en: KVideo is a modern video aggregation and playback platform built with Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, and TypeScript. It features a distinctive “Liquid Glass” UI system for smooth, depth-rich interactions. The app delivers federated multi-source search with parallel queries and real-time results via Server-Sent Events, plus customizable and subscribable sources with a unified parser layer. Playback is HLS-first with proxy modes, stutter detection, PiP, Chromecast, and mobile-friendly controls. It also includes IPTV (M3U/M3U8) support with stream proxying, plus Douban metadata, recommendations, favorites, and resume history.

metadata.name: prompt-optimizer
metadata.description: An AI prompt optimizer for writing better prompts and getting better AI results.

summary.zh: 面向提示词工程的优化与测试工具，支持系统/用户提示词一键迭代、原始与优化结果对比。内置变量管理、多轮会话与工具调用调试，集成OpenAI、Gemini、DeepSeek等及文生图/图生图。纯客户端直连模型，提供Web/桌面/插件/Docker与MCP接入。
summary.en: Prompt Optimizer is a prompt engineering assistant for refining system and user prompts through iterative rewriting and side-by-side evaluation. It provides variable templating, multi-turn conversation tests, and tool/function-calling playgrounds to harden prompts for production formats. The app integrates multiple LLM and image models (OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Zhipu, SiliconFlow, etc.) and supports T2I and I2I workflows. Built as a client-side app with optional access password, it ships as web, desktop, Chrome extension, Docker, and MCP server integrations. Real-time diff testing helps quantify improvements and choose the best prompt version.

metadata.name: CLIProxyAPI
metadata.description: Wrap Gemini CLI, Antigravity, ChatGPT Codex, Claude Code as an OpenAI/Gemini/Claude/Codex compatible API service, allowing you to enjoy the free Gemini 2.5 Pro, GPT 5, Claude model through API

summary.zh: CLIProxyAPI 将 Gemini CLI、Claude Code、Codex、Qwen 等封装为 OpenAI/Gemini/Claude 兼容 API 服务，支持 OAuth 登录、多账号轮询负载、流式与非流式输出、工具/函数调用及图文多模态输入。适用于 IDE/SDK/Amp 等客户端无缝对接，以统一接口低成本调用多家 CLI 模型能力。
summary.en: CLIProxyAPI turns Gemini CLI, Claude Code, OpenAI Codex (GPT), Qwen Code and iFlow into OpenAI/Gemini/Claude/Codex-compatible API endpoints. It supports OAuth-based login, multi-account round-robin load balancing, streaming and non-streaming responses, tool/function calling, and multimodal inputs (text + images). Designed for CLI and coding clients (SDKs, IDE extensions, Amp), it enables seamless use of multiple providers through one stable gateway, with model mapping and smart fallback routing when models are unavailable.

metadata.name: EnsoAI
metadata.description: Multiple Agents, Parallel Flow

summary.zh: EnsoAI 是 Electron/React 桌面端多智能体开发工具，将 Git worktree 作为独立工作区；每个分支保留专属 AI 上下文，并行调用 Claude/Gemini/Codex 等代理完成编码、Diff 审查与提交，减少频繁切换带来的上下文损耗，提升多分支并行开发与协作效率。
summary.en: EnsoAI is an Electron/React desktop app that rethinks developer workflow around Git worktrees. It treats each branch as a first-class workspace with its own persistent AI context, enabling parallel work without constant context switching. You can run and switch between multiple agents—Claude, Gemini, Codex, and other CLI-based or local LLM tools—across different worktrees simultaneously. Built-in visual source control helps review diffs, stage changes, and manage commits, making multi-branch coding and review faster and more organized.

metadata.name: agent-designer
metadata.description: Purpose Design and maintain Codex/Claude-style SKILLs, plus supporting docs and MCP tool catalog.

summary.zh: 面向Codex/Claude的SKILL工作区，内置技能设计规范、AGENTS规则与Issue CSV计划模板，并可生成MCP工具目录。提供Claude/Gemini桥接协作与结构校验，适合沉淀可复用AI代理技能与开发流程。
summary.en: A Codex/Claude-style SKILL workspace focused on designing, standardizing, and maintaining agent capabilities. It ships opinionated documentation and workflow assets: AGENTS.md project rules, an issue-driven planning CSV/template, testing defaults, and an auto-generated MCP tools catalog to improve tool-aware planning. Bridge workflows support collaborating with Claude or Gemini without invoking their CLIs directly. Documentation-first and structure-validated, it’s ideal for teams building reusable agent skills and repeatable delivery processes.

metadata.name: AutoGLM-GUI
metadata.description: AutoGLM 的现代化 Web 图形界面 - 让 AI 自动化操作 Android 设备变得简单 已进化为你的专属自动化生产力工具

summary.zh: AutoGLM-GUI 是 AI 驱动的 Android 自动化前端，基于 ADB+scrcpy 实时预览与交互，采用分层 LLM 代理完成复杂任务；支持无线配对、多设备、Workflow、Cron 定时与 Docker 7x24 部署，并提供 MCP 接入。
summary.en: AutoGLM-GUI is a modern Web/desktop interface for AutoGLM that turns Android control into a production-grade automation hub. It combines ADB and scrcpy for low-latency live preview and direct touch/gesture interaction, and uses a layered LLM-agent architecture to separate planning from execution for reliable multi-step tasks. It adds cron-style scheduling, conversation history, fast interruption, multi-device isolation, wireless pairing for Android 11+, Docker deployment for 24/7 operation, and an embedded MCP server for integration with tools like Claude Desktop and Cursor.

metadata.name: Open-AutoGLM
metadata.description: An Open Phone Agent Model & Framework. Unlocking the AI Phone for Everyone

summary.zh: Open-AutoGLM 提供基于视觉语言模型的手机代理框架，通过 ADB/HDC 感知屏幕并结合规划能力自动执行操作链，支持用自然语言/语音驱动“打开App-搜索-点击-输入”等任务；内置敏感操作确认、登录/验证码人工接管与远程 ADB 调试，适用于手机智能助理、UI 自动化与无障碍交互。
summary.en: Open-AutoGLM is an open phone-agent model and framework that understands mobile screens with a vision-language model and executes tasks via ADB/HDC automation. Users describe goals in natural language (or voice), and the agent plans and performs multi-step UI actions such as launching apps, searching, tapping, and typing. It includes safety-oriented confirmation for sensitive operations, plus human takeover for login or CAPTCHA flows. Remote ADB debugging over Wi‑Fi/network enables flexible development and device control, and it integrates with Midscene.js for cross-platform UI automation.

metadata.name: DesktopFriends
metadata.description: A desktop companion for Live2D driven by agent system.

summary.zh: AI Live2D桌面宠物，Vue3+TS开发，Tauri(macOS)/Capacitor(Android)跨端。接入OpenAI并以Function Calling驱动表情动作；局域网互聊，支持模型包上传、记录导出。
summary.en: DesktopFriends is a cross-platform AI Live2D pet built with Vue 3 + TypeScript, shipped via Tauri for macOS and Capacitor for Android. It connects to LLMs (e.g., OpenAI) and uses function calling to trigger each model’s expressions and motions during replies, including an inner-monologue bubble style. Pets can discover each other on the local network and chat across devices through a Fastify + Socket.io relay, with model package upload and chat log export.

metadata.name: code-switch-R
metadata.description: Claude Code & Codex 多供应商代理与管理工具

summary.zh: Code Switch 是面向 Claude Code/Codex/Gemini CLI 的桌面代理与多供应商管理器：在本地端口统一转发请求，按优先级自动降级切换 API，支持模型名映射，提供 Token/请求/成本统计与热力图，并集中管理 MCP 服务器与 CLI 配置，适合多密钥、多渠道与稳定性/成本敏感的开发者。
summary.en: Code Switch is a desktop proxy and multi-provider manager for Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI. It runs a local forwarding gateway to route requests through configurable providers with priority levels and automatic failover. It also offers model-name mapping across vendors, detailed usage analytics (requests, tokens, success rate) and cost tracking, plus centralized MCP server and CLI config management—ideal for developers juggling multiple keys/providers and needing reliability and spend control.

metadata.name: AntigravityQuotaWatcher
metadata.description: Google Antigravity AI模型配额监控插件 (Antigravity AI Model Quota Watching)

summary.zh: 面向 Antigravity IDE 的 VS Code 插件，自动探测服务端口与凭证并轮询模型配额，在状态栏与 Dashboard 展示剩余额度与重置时间，低配额变色预警，支持本地登录同步及周限检测。
summary.en: Antigravity Quota Watcher is a VS Code extension for Google Antigravity IDE that continuously polls AI model quota usage and surfaces it in the status bar and a rich Dashboard. It auto-detects the local Antigravity server port and authentication, can import existing local login credentials, and highlights low quota via color warnings. The Dashboard lists remaining quota and reset times per model, shows connection and account status, and provides quick actions such as refresh and re-detect. Optional weekly-limit checks send a minimal test request.

metadata.name: skills
metadata.description: This repository contains a collection of Agent Skills developed by GudaStudio, enabling seamless collaboration between Claude and other AI models and tools.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供面向 Claude Code 的 Agent Skills 合集，以模块化技能将编程任务委派给 Codex/Gemini 等 CLI，实现多模型协作的原型开发、调试与代码审查，并提供跨平台一键安装脚本，支持用户级/项目级与自定义路径部署。
summary.en: This repository curates GudaStudio Agent Skills for Claude Code, leveraging Anthropic’s modular “Agent Skills” mechanism to plug in specialized workflows on demand. It enables seamless multi-model collaboration by delegating coding tasks to external CLIs such as OpenAI Codex and Google Gemini for prototyping, debugging, and code review. The repo includes cross-platform installers (Bash/PowerShell), supports user-level and project-level installation, and allows custom target paths, making skill rollout consistent across teams and environments.

metadata.name: dompdf.js
metadata.description: Convert HTML to a multi-thousand-page vector PDF with a single line of frontend code

summary.zh: dompdf.js 在浏览器端将网页 DOM 与样式直接映射为可编辑、可打印的矢量 PDF，支持分页并可生成上千页文档。它改造 html2canvas 的 canvas 渲染器并驱动 jsPDF 输出真实 PDF，避免“截图式”图片 PDF，文件更小、清晰度更高。适用于前端一键导出报表/合同/长文档，但复杂 CSS 与视觉一致性仍有限。
summary.en: dompdf.js generates editable, printable vector PDFs directly in the browser by translating DOM structure and computed styles into jsPDF drawing commands. By modifying html2canvas’s canvas renderer, it avoids the common screenshot-to-PDF workflow, producing real PDFs with smaller size and better print quality. It includes pagination and can export documents with thousands of pages, making it suitable for one-click frontend exports such as reports, invoices, and long-form documents. Some CSS is unsupported and visual fidelity may differ from actual rendering.

metadata.name: redBookMCP
metadata.description: 小红书MCP Server一站式图文内容生成

summary.zh: 基于 Model Context Protocol（MCP）的“小红书”图文内容生成服务，面向 Claude Desktop/Claude Code 工作流，提供大纲生成与编辑、图片生成及项目管理能力；通过 npx 一键启动并对接外部图片生成 API（URL/Key/Model 可配），以“项目/资源”抽象组织内容产物。仓库已标记 Deprecated，建议用 Claude Code skill 替代。
summary.en: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for generating Xiaohongshu-style image-and-text posts within Claude Desktop/Claude Code workflows. It supports smart outline generation and editing, image generation via configurable external image APIs (URL/key/model), and project-based asset management exposed as MCP tools/resources. It can be launched via npx with minimal setup. The repository is marked deprecated, as equivalent functionality is now recommended to be implemented using Claude Code skills.

metadata.name: gemini-3-pro-image-preview
metadata.description: Gemini 3 Pro - AI 绘图工作台 (Web Client)

summary.zh: 基于 Gemini 3 Pro 的纯前端绘图工作台，支持批量并发、4K/多比例与参考图生成。IndexedDB 持久化会话并保留上下文续作；多 API 渠道轮询，兼容 OpenAI 接口，支持流式响应与 File System Access 本地自动保存。
summary.en: Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview is a framework-free web client for AI image generation powered by Google Gemini. It targets high-throughput creation with concurrent batch jobs, 1K–4K rendering, multiple aspect ratios, and reference-image guided generation. Conversations are persisted in IndexedDB and can retain configurable context for iterative workflows. It also provides multi-channel API routing with random polling, supports both native Gemini endpoints and OpenAI-compatible interfaces, and offers streaming responses plus optional auto-save via the browser File System Access API.
tags_zh: File System Access 自动保存

metadata.name: AI-generated-English-podcast-videos
metadata.description: AI生成英语对话的播客视频！一键生成，下载视频，学英语，发抖音。 AI-generated English conversation podcast videos! Create with one click, download videos, learn English, and share on TikTok.

summary.zh: 该项目输入一篇文章即可自动生成英语（或中文）对话播客短视频：LLM生成脚本、TTS配音、Whisper/Edge字幕、无版权高清素材与背景音乐并一键合成。提供WebUI与API，支持批量生成、多分辨率、字幕样式可调及多模型接入，适合英语学习内容生产与抖音/TikTok矩阵化发布。
summary.en: This repo turns a single article into an AI-generated conversation podcast short video end-to-end: LLM script generation (or custom scripts), TTS voice synthesis, subtitles via Edge or Whisper, royalty-free HD stock footage, and background music, then composes everything into a high-quality video. It ships with a clean MVC codebase plus both Web UI and API, supports batch rendering, multiple aspect ratios, configurable clip timing, and rich subtitle styling. Ideal for English-learning content creation and TikTok/Douyin distribution workflows.

metadata.name: All-Model-Chat
metadata.description: 一个全能的 AI 聊天助手，深度集成 Gemini 生态。支持多模态交互（文本/语音/图片/视频）、实时联网搜索、代码执行、长文档分析及高级推理功能。内置丰富的预设场景与个性化配置，助您探索 AI 的无限可能。

summary.zh: 面向Google Gemini生态的本地优先AI工作台，React+TS实现多模态对话、Live音视频流、联网搜索与代码沙箱。支持长文档/代码库解析、Canvas可视化与多Key轮询，数据存IndexedDB无需后端部署。
summary.en: All Model Chat is a flagship, local-first AI workstation built specifically for the Google Gemini API ecosystem. Powered by React 18, TypeScript, and Vite, it delivers multimodal chat (text, voice, images, video), low-latency Live audio/video streaming, web search with citations, and an embedded Python sandbox for code execution. It also supports long-document and codebase ingestion (ZIP/folder), Canvas/Artifacts visualization (HTML, ECharts, Mermaid), and enterprise-grade key rotation with proxy/Vertex AI endpoint compatibility.

metadata.name: tgbot-verify
metadata.description: 一个基于 Python Telegram Bot 的自动化认证工具，能够自动完成 SheerID 平台的学生/教师身份验证流程。

summary.zh: 基于 Python 的 Telegram 机器人，自动生成身份资料与证件图片并提交至 SheerID，批量完成学生/教师优惠认证；提供多服务模块化适配、MySQL 积分/邀请/卡密体系、Playwright 并发与稳定性控制，并支持 Docker 部署，适合自动化运营教育优惠验证流程。
summary.en: A Python-based Telegram bot that automates SheerID student/teacher verification end-to-end. It generates synthetic identity profiles, creates verification documents (PNG/PDF), and submits workflows to SheerID using httpx plus Playwright automation. The repo ships modular commands for multiple programs (e.g., Gemini One Pro, ChatGPT Teacher K12, Spotify Student, Bolt.new), a MySQL-backed credit system (check-in, invites, redeem codes), concurrency controls for stability, and env-driven configuration with Docker Compose deployment.

metadata.name: claude-code-hub
metadata.description: 一个现代化的 Claude Code & Codex API 代理服务，提供智能负载均衡、用户管理和使用统计功能。

summary.zh: 面向团队的 Claude/Codex 多供应商 API 代理平台，统一 OpenAI 兼容接入；提供权重/优先级调度与熔断故障转移、限流并发控制、用户与用量统计、会话缓存与审计链路，并内置自动化 OpenAPI 文档与实时监控。基于 Next.js 15+Hono+PostgreSQL+Redis，Docker 即可部署。
summary.en: Claude Code Hub is a modern team-oriented API proxy for Claude, Codex, Gemini and other OpenAI-compatible providers. It offers unified endpoints, intelligent routing with weights/priority groups, circuit breaking and failover, plus multi-dimensional rate limits and concurrency control powered by Redis atomic scripts. The platform adds user management, pricing and usage analytics dashboards, session caching with decision-chain auditability, and auto-generated OpenAPI 3.1 docs with Swagger/Scalar UIs. Built on Next.js 15, Hono, PostgreSQL and Redis, it ships as a Docker-ready deployment.

summary.zh: 基于React19+Vite6的纯前端Gemini 3 Pro多模态聊天客户端，支持拖拽/粘贴多图、生成图下载与历史持久化，流式输出与思维链折叠可视化，并用街机小游戏缓解长推理等待。
summary.en: A modern, frontend-only React 19 + Vite 6 client for interacting with Google Gemini 3 Pro (default: gemini-3-pro-image-preview). It delivers streaming chat with Markdown rendering and multimodal inputs (text plus up to 14 images), including frictionless paste and drag-and-drop uploads. Generated images can be downloaded, automatically collected into a persistent local gallery, and reviewed with prompt details. Advanced options cover model/endpoint overrides, grounding toggle, image resolution/aspect controls, local API key storage, and an arcade “waiting mode” with built-in mini games during long reasoning.

metadata.name: banana-slides
metadata.description: 一个基于nano banana pro🍌的原生AI PPT生成应用，迈向真正的＂Vibe PPT＂; 支持上传任意模板图片；上传任意素材&智能解析；一句话/大纲/页面描述自动生成PPT；口头修改指定区域、一键导出可编辑ppt - An AI-native slides generator based on nano banana pro🍌

summary.zh: banana-slides基于nano banana pro，一句话/大纲生成风格统一PPT；可上传模板图与PDF/Docx素材，智能提取要点图表；支持自然语言局部重绘与整页优化，一键导出PPTX/PDF，适合教学与职场汇报提案。
summary.en: banana-slides is an AI-native slide generator built on nano banana pro. It turns a single idea, outline, or per-page description into cohesive, high-quality PPT decks with strong style consistency. Users can upload any template/reference image and import materials such as PDF, DOCX, Markdown, or text; the system parses content and extracts key points, images, and chart cues. “Vibe” editing enables natural-language, region-level redraws or full-page refinement. Export is one-click to PPTX or PDF, targeting fast decks for teaching, reports, and proposals.

metadata.name: code-switch
metadata.description: Claude Code & Codex 多供应商代理与管理工具

summary.zh: Code Switch 是面向 Claude Code 与 Codex 的本地代理管理器：启动即在 18100 端口提供兼容端点，自动改写 CLI 配置为固定地址，实现无需重启的供应商平滑切换。内置多供应商优先级与失败自动降级、请求级用量与费用统计，并同时管理 cc/codex MCP Server。支持 Claude Skill 仓库自动下载安装与自定义扩展，基于 Wails 3 跨平台发布。
summary.en: Code Switch is a local proxy manager for Claude Code and Codex. It starts an HTTP proxy on port 18100, rewrites CLI configs to a stable localhost endpoint, and enables seamless provider switching without restarting tools. Requests are routed to the highest-priority enabled provider with automatic fallback on failures. It also offers per-request usage/cost tracking, unified management for cc & codex MCP servers, and automatic Claude Skill repository download/installation with custom repos supported. Built with Wails 3 for cross-platform distribution.
tags_zh: 本地 LLM 代理网关

metadata.name: geminimcp
metadata.description: Gemini-MCP is an MCP server that encapsulates Google's Gemini CLI tool into a standard MCP protocol interface, enabling Claude Code to invoke Gemini for AI-assisted programming tasks.

summary.zh: Gemini-MCP 提供 MCP 服务器，将 Google Gemini CLI 封装为标准 MCP 工具，使 Claude Code 可直接调用 Gemini 完成代码生成、评审与前端设计增强。通过 stdio 传输与 uvx 一键安装，适合在本地开发流中实现多模型协同与能力互补。
summary.en: Gemini-MCP is an MCP server that wraps Google’s Gemini CLI as a standard Model Context Protocol interface, so Claude Code can invoke Gemini for AI-assisted programming. It enables multi-model collaboration in a local developer workflow, including code generation, review, and stronger front-end design output. The server uses stdio transport and supports quick installation via uv/uvx, making it easy to plug Gemini into Claude’s tool ecosystem with minimal configuration and predictable tool calls.

metadata.name: claude-relay-service
metadata.description: CRS-自建Claude Code镜像，一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Droid 订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

summary.zh: CRS 是可自建的 Claude Code/API 中转网关，提供多账户轮换、独立 Key、用量与成本统计、限速与访问控制及代理支持。适合地区受限、隐私敏感或多人拼车分摊订阅的团队，以 Node.js+Redis+Docker 部署，原生工具无缝接入。
summary.en: Claude Relay Service (CRS) is a self-hosted relay/mirror for Claude Code and compatible LLM endpoints, enabling unified access for multiple users without relying on unstable third-party mirrors. It supports multi-account pooling and automatic failover, per-user API keys, detailed token/cost accounting, and a web admin dashboard. Built with Node.js and Redis and shipped with Docker-ready deployment scripts, CRS adds performance optimizations (pooling/cache), rate limiting, access controls, and proxy support—ideal for privacy-sensitive teams, regions with access limits, or subscription cost sharing (“carpooling”).

metadata.name: ccstatusline
metadata.description: 🚀 Beautiful highly customizable statusline for Claude Code CLI with powerline support, themes, and more.

summary.zh: ccstatusline 是面向 Claude Code CLI 的状态栏格式化器，提供 Powerline 分隔、主题与 TUI 配置。可展示模型/会话、Git 分支与仓库名、token/上下文、计时与内存等指标，并通过缓存与更健壮的 git 解析提升性能，兼顾 Windows 管道输出，适合打造可观测、个性化的终端工作流。
summary.en: ccstatusline is a highly customizable statusline formatter for the Claude Code CLI. It adds Powerline-style segments, theming, and an interactive TUI configurator to compose widgets that surface model/session details, Git context (branch/root), token and context usage, timers, and system memory. Recent releases focus on performance via hashed per-config caches and more reliable Git command helpers, plus fixes for Windows UTF-8 piped output. Ideal for developers who want a clean, observable, and personalized terminal workflow while coding with Claude.

metadata.name: flow2api
metadata.description: 无限次数的banana pro！逆向账号池，支持负载均衡、AT自动刷新、缓存策略、代理等。Q交流群1073237297

summary.zh: 基于FastAPI的OpenAI兼容网关，将Flow图像/视频生成能力统一为标准接口；内置多Token账号池轮询、并发控制、缓存策略，支持HTTP/SOCKS5代理，并提供AT/ST自动刷新与Web后台管理，适合自建多媒体生成服务和团队共享调用。
summary.en: Flow2API is a FastAPI-based, OpenAI-compatible API gateway that exposes Flow’s media capabilities through a unified interface. It supports text/image-to-image, text/image-to-video, and start/end-frame video workflows. The service includes a multi-token pool with round-robin load balancing, concurrency control, caching strategies, and HTTP/SOCKS5 proxy support. It also automates AT refresh and browser-assisted ST renewal, plus a web admin console for token and configuration management, and Docker-first deployment.

metadata.name: RedInk
metadata.description: Red Ink - A one-stop Xiaohongshu image-and-text generator based on the 🍌Nano Banana Pro🍌, "One Sentence, One Image: Generate Xiaohongshu Text and Images."

summary.zh: 红墨是一站式小红书图文生成器：输入一句话即可自动产出可编辑大纲、统一风格封面与内容页并支持批量并发生成与单页重绘。后端 Flask(Python3.11) + 前端 Vue3/TS，文案接入 Gemini，图片基于 Nano Banana Pro；支持 Web 可视化配置与 YAML 多服务商切换，提供 Docker 一键自部署。
summary.en: RedInk is an end-to-end Xiaohongshu post generator: provide one sentence and it produces an editable outline, a stylistically consistent cover, and batch-generated content pages with optional high concurrency and per-page re-generation. It uses a Flask (Python 3.11+) backend and a Vue 3 + TypeScript frontend. Copywriting is powered by Gemini, while images are generated via Nano Banana Pro. It supports web-based settings, YAML-based multi-provider switching, and one-command Docker self-hosting.

metadata.name: Video-Materials-AutoGEN-Workstation
metadata.description: 一个集内容策划、AI文案自动生成、TTS 批量自动配音、(AI)图片素材合成、ASR自动提取语言字幕脚本、AI自由创作于一体的(短视频)生成工作站。方便管理每期的视频项目。

summary.zh: 面向短视频生产的“一站式素材生成与项目管理”工作站，按模板批量产出脚本、TTS情绪配音、AI图片素材与ASR字幕脚本，并以前端实现图文分轨预览与替换。适用于矩阵号/投放团队的流水线创作与复用，亮点在于Gemini文案改写+批量TTS、素材提示词集中管理与Docker部署。
summary.en: An all-in-one workstation for short-video production that combines content planning, AI script generation, batch TTS voice-over with emotion, AI image material composition, and ASR-based subtitle/script extraction, wrapped with project-based management. It supports template-driven batch creation so each video project ships with scripts, images, audio, and captions, plus a frontend for multi-track preview and asset replacement. Best suited for creator studios and ad/matrix operations seeking repeatable pipelines, with Gemini-powered rewriting and containerized deployment.

metadata.name: Mole
metadata.description: 🐹 Deep clean and optimize your Mac.

summary.zh: Mole 是面向 macOS 的一体化命令行维护工具，集深度清理、残留卸载、磁盘可视分析与系统监控于单一二进制；提供 dry-run 预演、白名单保护与操作日志，适合快速释放空间、定位大文件并刷新缓存与系统服务。
summary.en: Mole is an all-in-one macOS maintenance CLI that merges deep cleaning, smart app uninstall (including hidden leftovers), disk usage analysis, and live system monitoring into a single binary. It targets real-world space recovery by removing caches, logs, browser residues, installer files, and project build artifacts, while also refreshing caches and system services for performance. Safety features like dry-run previews, whitelists, detailed debug output, and operation logs make it suitable for cautious power users and repeatable housekeeping via Homebrew.

metadata.name: mcp-router
metadata.description: A Unified MCP Server Management App (MCP Manager).

summary.zh: MCP Router 是跨平台桌面端 MCP 服务器管理器，统一连接本地/远程服务，支持 DXT、JSON 与手动配置。通过项目与工作区组织上下文，按服务器粒度开关工具，并提供请求日志与统计。数据、凭据与配置全本地存储且可审计，便于在 Claude/Cursor 等客户端一键集成与切换。
summary.en: MCP Router is a cross-platform desktop app that centralizes management of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. It connects to both local and remote servers and supports multiple setup paths including DXT, JSON, and manual configuration. Contexts can be organized with Projects and Workspace-style profiles, while tools can be toggled per server for precise control. It also provides detailed request logging and basic analytics. Designed as local-first, it keeps logs, configs, and credentials on-device and auditable, enabling quick integration with clients like Claude, Cursor, and more.

metadata.name: bilibili-video-downloader
metadata.description: 哔哩哔哩 bilibili B站 视频 下载器，图形界面 + nfo刮削 + 广告标记 + 字幕下载 + 弹幕下载，轻松将视频加入emby等媒体库

summary.zh: 基于Tauri v2的跨平台B站视频下载器，覆盖普通/充电/番剧/课程等。支持分片加速、断点续传与自定义命名；可抓取封面、CC字幕、弹幕并转ASS，生成NFO及poster/fanart，写入章节与广告跳过标记，便于入库Emby等媒体库。
summary.en: A cross-platform Bilibili video downloader with a modern Tauri v2 GUI. It supports regular and paid videos, series, movies, and courses, plus search and account features. Downloads are accelerated via segmented fetching with resume, batching, and rate limiting. It also fetches covers, CC subtitles (SRT), and danmaku (XML/JSON) with optional ASS conversion. Built-in NFO scraping downloads poster/fanart for easy import into Emby-like libraries, and it can embed chapters and ad-skip markers into the final media files.
tags_zh: 弹幕转ASS与广告章节标记

metadata.name: codexmcp
metadata.description: Enable seamless collaboration between Claude Code and Codex, transforming from a single agent to multiple agents for significantly enhanced productivity!

summary.zh: CodexMCP基于MCP协议打通Claude Code的架构规划与Codex的代码生成，提供会话持久化、多轮对话、并行任务与推理追踪，适用于团队级AI编程协同、重构与审查流水线，显著提升多代理开发效率。
summary.en: CodexMCP is an MCP-based bridge that enables Claude Code and OpenAI Codex to collaborate as a multi-agent coding system. Claude Code focuses on requirements, architecture, and refactoring, while Codex handles implementation, bug hunting, and reviews. Compared with the official Codex MCP, it adds enterprise-grade capabilities such as session persistence, multi-turn context management, parallel task execution, reasoning/trace visibility, and stronger error handling. It fits developer workflows that need iterative planning, patch prototyping, and post-change code review for higher productivity.

metadata.name: harmony-cursor-rules
metadata.description: 🎯 基于AI技术自动提取华为HarmonyOS官方最佳实践，生成专业的CursorRules规则文件。解决主流AI模型缺乏HarmonyOS语料的痛点，为开发者提供准确的智能代码提示。

summary.zh: 该工具通过爬取华为HarmonyOS官方最佳实践文档（含SPA解析），借助Gemini自动抽取可执行规范，按模块生成CursorRules文件。覆盖UI开发、性能优化与TypeScript→ArkTS迁移Lint/语法约束，补齐主流大模型HarmonyOS语料不足，显著提升Cursor在HarmonyOS项目中的代码提示准确度与一致性。
summary.en: This generator addresses the lack of HarmonyOS training data in mainstream LLMs by scraping Huawei’s official best-practice documentation (including SPA parsing) and using Gemini to extract actionable guidelines. It outputs structured CursorRules files organized by modules, covering UI patterns, performance tips, and TypeScript-to-ArkTS migration constraints such as lint rules and syntax restrictions. Developers can directly import the final merged rules into Cursor IDE to obtain more accurate, consistent HarmonyOS code suggestions aligned with official standards.

metadata.name: Claude-Code-Workflow
metadata.description: JSON-driven multi-agent  cadence-team development framework with   intelligent CLI orchestration (Gemini/Qwen/Codex),   context-first architecture, and automated workflow   execution

summary.zh: 以JSON定义可复用的多智能体开发工作流，提供角色分工与会话生命周期管理；通过CLI在Claude/Gemini/Qwen/Codex间编排并自动选型，配合队列调度、终端监控与模板化编辑器，实现上下文优先的自动化执行，适用于团队协同、TDD与需求拆解。
summary.en: Claude Code Workflow is a JSON-driven multi-agent development framework that codifies reusable workflows with role-based agents and session lifecycle management. It provides an intelligent CLI orchestrator that can route tasks across Claude, Gemini, Qwen, and Codex (auto-select or manual), enabling context-first execution. With a queue scheduler, terminal dashboard monitoring, and template-based workflow editing, it automates end-to-end planning and delivery loops. It fits cadence-style team collaboration, TDD-oriented workflows, and structured requirement breakdown.

metadata.name: DesktopCommanderMCP
metadata.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

summary.zh: Desktop Commander 是面向 Claude/ChatGPT 的 MCP 服务器，提供终端命令流式执行、后台任务与进程/会话管理；集成文件系统读写、ripgrep 递归搜索、差异化替换与多文件编辑。支持内存运行 Python/Node/R、直接读写与搜索 Excel，以及 PDF 提取/生成/修改，并内置工具调用审计日志，适用于本地开发自动化与数据处理。
summary.en: Desktop Commander is an MCP server for Claude/ChatGPT that enables secure desktop automation: streamed terminal execution, background jobs, and interactive process/session control. It extends filesystem capabilities with fast recursive search (ripgrep), surgical replace/diff-style editing, and full file operations. It also runs code in memory (Python/Node/R), performs instant analysis on CSV/JSON/Excel, and offers native Excel and PDF read/write/edit support. Comprehensive audit logging and dynamic configuration make it practical for real-world dev workflows and automation.
tags_zh: 代码库搜索与差异编辑

metadata.name: MuMuAINovel
metadata.description: 一款基于 AI 的智能小说创作助手，帮助你轻松创作精彩故事

summary.zh: MuMuAINovel 是面向网文作者的 AI 小说工作台，接入 OpenAI/Gemini/Claude，自动生成大纲、角色与世界观，并支持章节重写润色。内置角色/组织/伏笔管理与章节关系图谱，可视化追踪剧情。提供 Prompt 工坊模板分享与导入导出，FastAPI+React+PostgreSQL 多用户隔离，Docker 一键部署。
summary.en: MuMuAINovel is an AI-powered novel writing workstation for web-fiction authors. It integrates multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude) to generate outlines, characters, and world-building, and to rewrite or polish chapters. The app includes visual management for characters, organizations, foreshadowing threads, and chapter relationship graphs to keep plots consistent. A Prompt Workshop enables sharing and importing prompt templates, plus project/card import-export. Built with FastAPI + React and PostgreSQL for multi-user isolation, it ships with Docker for turnkey deployment.

metadata.name: BettaFish
metadata.description: 微舆：人人可用的多Agent舆情分析助手，打破信息茧房，还原舆情原貌，预测未来走向，辅助决策！从0实现，不依赖任何框架。

summary.zh: 微舆BettaFish从零实现纯Python多Agent舆情分析助手，自动采集30+社媒与评论，支持短视频/结构化卡片解析；以“论坛”协作与多模型中间件提升洞察，并可融合私域数据生成决策报告与趋势预测。
summary.en: BettaFish (WeiYu) is a from-scratch, framework-free Python multi-agent social listening assistant. It continuously crawls 30+ major platforms (Weibo, Xiaohongshu, Douyin, etc.) down to massive comment threads, then runs a composite analytics pipeline that combines specialized agents, fine-tuned/statistical models, and multimodal parsers for short videos and structured search cards. An “agent forum” debate mechanism reduces single-model bias and improves decision support. Designed for rapid extension, you can swap tools and prompts to target finance or brand risk.

metadata.name: video-to-txt
metadata.description: 二开项目，多模态 AI 视频分析、本地/云端双引擎 (支持 Ollama 与 OpenAI 兼容 API)、智能关键帧提取与画质分析、高性能音频转录 (Whisper)、AI 摘要报告与动态媒体生成 (视频/GIF)、集成化 WebUI 与实时流式响应、自动化环境配置与系统资源监控

summary.zh: 基于 Gradio 的多模态视频分析 WebUI，集成关键帧提取、画质指标评估与 Faster-Whisper 高性能转录，并将帧+文本进行时空对齐生成结构化摘要报告。支持本地 Ollama 与 OpenAI 兼容 API 双引擎，可一键生成摘要视频/GIF，适用于课程复盘、素材粗剪、内容审校与信息核查等场景。
summary.en: A Gradio-based multimodal video analysis WebUI that combines intelligent keyframe selection, objective visual quality metrics, and high-throughput transcription via Faster-Whisper. It aligns frames with timestamped text to produce structured AI summary reports, and can generate highlight media such as recap videos and GIFs. The system supports a dual inference backend—local Ollama models or OpenAI-compatible cloud APIs—making it suitable for lecture review, rough-cut editing, content auditing, and video fact-checking workflows.
tags_zh: 关键帧提取与画质分析

metadata.name: cc-switch
metadata.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.

summary.zh: CC Switch 是基于 Tauri 2 的跨平台桌面助手，将 Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode 与 Gemini CLI 统一到一个 GUI 中管理与启动。它聚焦多工具并存场景，提供配置与账号/密钥集中维护、环境切换与一键运行，降低命令行门槛，适合开发者在不同模型与渠道间快速切换并保持稳定工作流。
summary.en: CC Switch is a cross-platform desktop assistant built with Tauri 2 that unifies Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Gemini CLI into a single GUI. It targets real-world workflows where multiple AI coding CLIs coexist, centralizing configuration, credentials, and runtime environment management. By enabling quick profile switching and one-click launching, it reduces CLI friction and helps developers move between models/providers smoothly. The result is a more consistent, reliable daily setup for AI-assisted coding across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
tags_zh: AI 编码 CLI 编排

metadata.name: MoneyPrinterTurbo
metadata.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

summary.zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 只需输入主题/关键词，即可自动生成脚本、配音、字幕、素材与背景音乐并合成高清短视频。提供 Web 与 API，MVC 架构便于二次开发；支持竖屏/横屏、多尺寸、批量生成与片段时长控制。可接入 OpenAI、DeepSeek、Gemini、Ollama 等多家模型，适用于内容营销与自媒体流水线生产。
summary.en: MoneyPrinterTurbo turns a topic or keywords into an HD short video end-to-end: script generation, stock footage sourcing, subtitle creation, voice synthesis, background music selection, and final composition. It ships with both a Web UI and an API, built on a clean MVC structure for maintainability and customization. The pipeline supports vertical/horizontal formats, multiple resolutions, batch generation, and clip duration control. It integrates with many LLM providers (OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Ollama, etc.), fitting content marketing and creator automation workflows.

metadata.name: rustdesk
metadata.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

summary.zh: RustDesk 是 Rust 编写的开源远程桌面，主打自托管替代 TeamViewer。跨平台客户端开箱即用，可部署自建 rendezvous/relay 服务器完成穿透与中继，数据与访问控制留在本地。Flutter/Sciter UI，支持远程控制、文件传输与权限管理，适用于企业运维、远程协助与合规场景。
summary.en: RustDesk is an open-source remote desktop and remote support application written in Rust, built for self-hosting as a TeamViewer alternative. It provides cross-platform clients (desktop and mobile) that work out of the box, while letting you run your own rendezvous and relay servers for NAT traversal and traffic forwarding. This keeps identity, routing, and access policies under your control, improving privacy and compliance. The UI is built with Flutter (Sciter legacy) and includes interactive control, file transfer, and session/permission management.

metadata.name: tts
metadata.description: 一个基于 Microsoft Edge TTS 的免费在线语音合成服务，支持 20+ 种中文声音，一键将文字转换为自然流畅的语音。

summary.zh: VoiceCraft 基于 Edge TTS 与硅基流动 STT，提供免费网页与 API 的 TTS/STT 双向服务。20+ 中文音色与多语种，支持语速/音调/风格调参、音频下载。兼容 OpenAI TTS 接口，可一键部署到 Cloudflare Workers，适用于配音、朗读与转录。
