summary.en: VoiceCraft is a free web + API speech platform combining Microsoft Edge Text-to-Speech with SiliconFlow Speech-to-Text. It provides 20+ Chinese neural voices, multilingual UI, and controls for speed, pitch, and speaking style, with downloadable audio and editable transcripts. The HTTP endpoints follow the OpenAI TTS API shape, simplifying integration into apps, bots, and automation workflows. Built for quick serverless rollout on Cloudflare Workers, it fits narration, accessibility reading, short-video/podcast dubbing, and meeting transcription at low operational cost.

metadata.name: spec-kit
metadata.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

summary.zh: Spec Kit 提供 Specify CLI 与 /speckit 指令，将需求场景写成可执行规格，驱动 AI 代理生成代码、测试与文档。适用于从零启动或重构项目：先定义项目原则与可验收结果，再自动落地实现，减少随意“vibe coding”，提升交付质量与一致性。
summary.en: Spec Kit is an open-source toolkit for Spec-Driven Development, centered on the Specify CLI and /speckit assistant commands. It turns product scenarios and desired outcomes into executable specs that can drive AI agents to generate implementations, tests, and supporting docs. The workflow starts by defining a project “constitution” (quality, testing, UX, performance rules), then iteratively specifies what/why before coding. It’s well-suited for bootstrapping new apps or stabilizing refactors with predictable, repeatable delivery.

metadata.name: request-manager
metadata.description: request-manager

summary.zh: 基于FastAPI+React的HTTP请求管理与自动化调度平台，支持Fiddler Raw/cURL导入、请求CRUD、定时/周期并发执行、重试与代理轮换，并提供执行记录统计与实时任务监控，适合接口测试、爬虫任务与批量API运维自动化。
summary.en: RequestManager is an HTTP request management and automation platform built with FastAPI and React (TypeScript). It imports requests from Fiddler Raw dumps or cURL commands, provides full CRUD with tags/categories, and runs them as scheduled jobs with periodic triggers, multi-thread concurrency, and configurable retry policies. The system includes proxy pool management with automatic rotation, detailed execution history and statistics, plus real-time task monitoring and control. It fits API testing, batch API operations, and crawler-style request orchestration workflows.

metadata.name: mise
metadata.description: dev tools, env vars, task runner

summary.zh: mise 是一体化开发环境前端：管理上百种工具版本（替代 asdf），按目录注入环境变量并加载 .env（类 direnv），并提供 make 风格任务运行。通过 shell 激活获得真实可执行路径而非 shim，适合多语言项目在本地与 CI 中统一版本、变量与构建流程。
summary.en: mise is an all-in-one front-end for developer environments. It manages versions of hundreds of tools across languages (asdf-like), provides directory-scoped environment variables and .env loading (direnv-style), and includes a task runner similar to make for build/test workflows. After shell activation, it exposes real executable paths instead of shims, improving reliability and debuggability. It’s ideal for polyglot teams needing consistent toolchains, env configuration, and repeatable tasks across local machines and CI.

metadata.name: sf-express-return-picture
metadata.description: 顺丰电商退货地址截图模拟.Simulation of SF-Express E-commerce Return Address Screenshot.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供“电商退货地址截图”生成器，用于模拟顺丰/京东等平台退货页，借助规范地址信息生成可截图的寄件凭证，以获取退货渠道的运费优惠并支持叠加券。项目以纯前端实现（HTML+JS），提供在线与本地静态部署，集成剪贴板读写、信息清空等交互，单模板适配多快递/电商平台场景。
summary.en: This repo is a front-end “return-address screenshot” simulator for SF Express and other e-commerce/shipping platforms. It helps users generate a realistic return-page layout from standardized address details, enabling screenshot-based proof commonly used in return-shipping workflows and discount channels. Built with HTML + JavaScript (no backend), it supports online hosting or local static serving, and includes clipboard import/export plus one-click reset. A single template is designed to fit multiple platforms such as JD, STO, and ZTO.

metadata.name: Sketch2Motion
metadata.description: convert photo or sketch to motion video

summary.zh: Sketch2Motion 将照片/涂鸦转换为“手绘生成”动画视频：先把图像提取为线稿并矢量化为 SVG，再用 Manim 按路径分段绘制渲染为高质量 MP4，并用末帧前置制造自然停顿。提供 Gradio 网页端可调时长、子路径延迟、缩放与多种绘制曲线，适用于教学演示、产品讲解与创意短视频制作。
summary.en: Sketch2Motion turns a photo, doodle, or sketch into a polished “drawing” animation. It converts the input image to a sketch, vectorizes it into SVG paths, then renders a high-quality MP4 with Manim by animating subpaths in sequence. The app also prepends the last frame to create a brief intro pause for smoother playback. A Gradio web UI exposes key controls—duration, subpath delay ratio, scale, and multiple drawing styles—making it practical for explainers, educational visuals, and quick motion content.

metadata.name: file-transfer-go
metadata.description: Go/React开发的端到端webrtc的文件传输/文字传输/桌面共享，安全，隐私，数据不经过服务器。

summary.zh: 基于 Go + Next.js/React 的端到端 WebRTC P2P 快传工具，通过 WebSocket 仅做信令协商，文件/文本/桌面共享数据经 DataChannel 直连传输，不落服务器，兼顾隐私与吞吐。支持多文件并发、ACK 可靠分片、断线恢复与自定义 STUN/TURN，提供响应式 UI 与 Docker/单文件多平台部署。
summary.en: A Go + Next.js/React end-to-end WebRTC P2P transfer tool. It uses WebSocket only for signaling, while files, text, and screen sharing stream directly over WebRTC DataChannels so payloads never pass through or persist on the server. It features multi-file concurrent transfer, ACK-based reliable chunking, connection recovery, and customizable STUN/TURN for NAT traversal, plus responsive UI and easy Docker or single-binary cross-platform deployment.

metadata.name: cunzhi
metadata.description: 告别AI提前终止烦恼，助力AI更加持久

summary.zh: 寸止是基于MCP的跨平台工具，拦截AI对话过早收尾并弹窗续聊；支持按项目记忆规范偏好、Markdown交互，并集成ACE语义代码搜索，提升Claude等助手持续解题与代码理解能力。
summary.en: Cunzhi is a cross-platform MCP tool that prevents assistants from ending conversations too early by triggering a continuation popup at the right moment. It adds project-scoped memory for coding conventions and personal preferences, provides Markdown-friendly interaction and a dedicated settings UI, and helps generate ready-to-use prompts for clients like Claude Desktop. It also integrates ACE-powered semantic code search, enabling deeper repository understanding and longer, more effective problem-solving sessions across macOS, Windows, and Linux.

metadata.name: xiaohongshu-mcp
metadata.description: MCP for xiaohongshu.com

summary.zh: 基于MCP的“小红书”自动化服务，提供登录/状态检查、图文与视频发布、搜索与推荐流获取、帖子详情（含互动与评论）、自动评论及用户主页抓取。支持HTTP API与MCP工具调用，并提供Docker镜像便于部署，适合LLM代理进行内容运营、批量发布与数据采集。
summary.en: xiaohongshu-mcp is an MCP server that lets LLM agents operate Xiaohongshu (RED) via tool calls. It supports login and session checks, publishing image posts (URL or local paths) and local video uploads, keyword search, home-feed recommendations, and rich note retrieval including engagement metrics and nested comments. It can also auto-post comments and fetch user profile pages. The project exposes HTTP APIs alongside MCP, ships Docker images for deployment, and targets automated content operations and lightweight data-collection workflows.

metadata.name: claude-code-router
metadata.description: Use Claude Code as the foundation for coding infrastructure, allowing you to decide how to interact with the model while enjoying updates from Anthropic.

summary.zh: 以 Claude Code 为底座提供本地路由代理，按任务类型在多模型供应商间分流与切换；支持请求/响应 Transformer 定制与插件扩展，提供 /model 动态换模与 ccr model CLI 管理，并可集成 GitHub Actions 在 CI 中触发自动化编码与审查任务。
summary.en: Claude Code Router turns Claude Code into a customizable routing layer for AI coding infrastructure. It proxies requests and routes them to different models/providers based on task needs (background work, deep thinking, long context), with support for OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Ollama, Gemini, Volcengine, and SiliconFlow. It also provides request/response transformers and a plugin system to adapt payloads across providers. Models can be switched on the fly via the /model command, managed via CLI, and automated in CI with GitHub Actions.
tags_zh: CLI 与 GitHub Actions 集成

metadata.name: mcp-shrimp-task-manager
metadata.description: Shrimp Task Manager is a task tool built for AI Agents, emphasizing chain-of-thought, reflection, and style consistency. It converts natural language into structured dev tasks with dependency tracking and iterative refinement, enabling agent-like developer behavior in reasoning AI systems.

summary.zh: 面向AI代理的MCP任务管理器，将自然语言需求转为可追踪的开发任务树，支持依赖关系、持久化进度、反思与风格模板，适配Claude Code等客户端，实现跨会话的代理式开发流程。
summary.en: Shrimp Task Manager is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for agentic software development. It turns natural-language goals into structured development tasks with decomposition, dependency tracking, and iterative refinement. By persisting task state across sessions, it preserves context under token limits and enables “developer-like” agent behavior. Built to integrate with MCP-compatible clients such as Claude Code, it emphasizes reflection and consistent writing/coding style via templates, providing guided workflows for planning, execution, and verification.

metadata.name: ai-goofish-monitor
metadata.description: 基于 Playwright 和AI实现的闲鱼多任务实时/定时监控与智能分析系统，配备了功能完善的后台管理UI。帮助用户从闲鱼海量商品中，找到心仪产品。

summary.zh: 基于 Playwright 的闲鱼多任务监控与抓取工具，结合多模态 AI 以自然语言生成任务并对商品图文做深度推荐判定。提供完整 Web 后台用于任务/账号/Prompt/日志与结果管理，支持区域/价格/发布时间等高级筛选、Cron 定时、代理与账号轮换重试，并通过 ntfy/企微/Telegram/Webhook 等实现即时通知，适合高频捡漏与精准选品。
summary.en: An AI-assisted Xianyu monitoring and scraping tool built on Playwright, enabling multi-task real-time or scheduled tracking. Users can create tasks with natural language and leverage multimodal LLMs to analyze listings (text + images) and decide whether to notify. It ships with a full web admin UI for tasks, accounts, prompts, logs, and result browsing, plus advanced filters (region, price, recency), cron scheduling, account/proxy rotation with retries, and rich notification channels (ntfy, WeCom, Bark, Telegram, webhooks).

metadata.name: ai-goofish
metadata.description: 一个功能强大的闲鱼商品监控系统，能够根据用户设定的关键词自动爬取商品信息，使用AI进行智能分析和筛选，并通过邮件等方式实时通知用户感兴趣的商品。

summary.zh: 面向闲鱼二手市场的商品监控平台：按关键词/价格自动爬取，Playwright渲染增强稳定性；接入大语言模型对商品做智能评估与推荐理由生成，结果入库并邮件实时推送；FastAPI+Web界面统一管理任务、代理池与Cookie池，配套日志与统计便于运维。
summary.en: An AI-driven Xianyu (Goofish) product monitoring system that continuously crawls listings by user-defined keywords and price ranges. It uses Playwright for JavaScript-rendered pages, plus proxy and cookie pools to improve robustness. A large language model analyzes each item, produces recommendation decisions and explanations, and stores structured results in SQLite. FastAPI provides REST APIs and a built-in web console for task management, settings, logs, and filtering. Notifications (e.g., email) deliver relevant deals in near real time.

summary.zh: 基于Cloudflare Workers与Hono构建的微信风格文件传输助手Web/PWA，支持SSE实时聊天、跨设备同步与10MB文件上传，D1+R2存储，JWT鉴权与离线缓存，零依赖前端便于快速部署。
summary.en: A WeChat-style File Transfer Assistant rebuilt as a modern Web/PWA on Cloudflare Workers with the Hono framework. It delivers real-time chat and multi-device sync via SSE, plus drag-and-drop and clipboard uploads for files up to 10MB. Messages are persisted in Cloudflare D1 (SQLite) and files in R2 object storage for scalable, globally distributed access. Security is handled with password protection and JWT sessions, while PWA offline caching enables app-like usage and fast edge responses.

metadata.name: AstrBot
metadata.description: AI Agent Assistant that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨

summary.zh: AstrBot 是面向多平台即时通讯的 Agent 聊天机器人基础设施，统一接入主流 IM、LLM 与工具链，通过插件市场扩展技能与工作流编排，支持可靠、可扩展的会话 AI 部署。提供 Docker/发行版交付，适合个人自动化、社群运营、企业客服与团队协作，作为 OpenClaw 的开源替代方案。
summary.en: AstrBot is an open-source, all-in-one agentic chatbot infrastructure for instant messaging. It unifies integrations across mainstream IM platforms, multiple LLM providers, and tool-based AI capabilities, enabling scalable conversational workflows. With a plugin marketplace and extensible architecture, developers can rapidly add skills, automations, and custom agents. Shipping with Docker-friendly deployment and production-minded components, AstrBot fits personal automation, community operations, customer support, and team assistants—positioning itself as a practical open alternative to OpenClaw.

metadata.name: zcf
metadata.description: Zero-Config Code Flow for Claude code & Codex

summary.zh: ZCF 是基于 npx 的零配置 CLI，一键为 Claude Code 与 Codex 完成安装、工作流注入、API/CCR 路由与 MCP 生态接入。提供中英双语交互与可预设的提供商/密钥参数，支持交互式与脚本化初始化及仅工作流更新，适合快速搭建稳定的 AI 编程环境与团队统一配置。
summary.en: ZCF (Zero-Config Code Flow) is an npm-powered CLI that bootstraps Claude Code and Codex with a single command. It automates installation, workflow provisioning, provider/key presets, API/CCR routing, and MCP integration, minimizing manual setup and copy-paste configuration. The tool offers a bilingual interactive menu plus non-interactive flags for scripting and CI usage, and supports updating workflows independently. It targets developers and teams who want a fast, reproducible, and stable AI coding environment across multiple providers.

metadata.name: Twocast
metadata.description: AI Podcast Generator for bilingual episodes, Multi Languages, Alternative to NotebookLLM；真人对话AI播客生成器，多语言，多音色

summary.zh: Twocast 可将主题/链接/文档/榜单页一键生成3–9分钟双人对话播客，产出大纲、脚本与可下载音频。融合OpenRouter LLM 与 FishAudio/Minimax/Gemini TTS，多语言多音色，借助Textract+FFmpeg完成解析与合成，适用于资讯速读与跨语内容再创作。
summary.en: Twocast generates short, two-person conversational podcasts (3–9 minutes) from a topic, URL, documents (PDF/DOC/TXT), or curated list pages. It outputs a complete package—outline, script, and downloadable audio—making it practical for news digestion, education recaps, and bilingual content repurposing. The pipeline combines LLM drafting via OpenRouter with multilingual TTS providers (Fish Audio, Minimax, Google Gemini), plus Textract-based text extraction and FFmpeg processing for audio assembly. Local and Docker deployments are supported with Postgres/Drizzle.

metadata.name: NarratoAI
metadata.description: 利用AI大模型，一键解说并剪辑视频； Using AI models to automatically provide commentary and edit videos with a single click.

summary.zh: NarratoAI 基于大模型把影视/短剧内容自动生成解说文案，并驱动剪辑、配音与字幕一键流水线。支持多模型供应商管理（LiteLLM）、视频理解（Qwen2‑VL）、语音克隆（IndexTTS2）与混剪，面向短视频内容生产提效。
summary.en: NarratoAI is an end-to-end AI workflow for movie/short-drama narration and automated video editing. It uses LLMs to draft commentary scripts, then drives a one-click pipeline covering clip selection/editing, voiceover (TTS), and subtitle generation. The project also adds practical creator features such as multi-provider model routing via LiteLLM, video understanding with Qwen2-VL, and voice cloning through IndexTTS2, enabling fast production of narrated recaps and remix-style cuts for short-form video channels.

metadata.name: novel_by_you
metadata.description: a novel program by you

summary.zh: 基于React+Vite的AI交互式小说生成器，按风格开局并以分支选项驱动剧情。引入关键词分段解析替代严格JSON，提升LLM输出容错；结合结构大纲迭代与用户偏好分析，在会话内保留历史与走向，适合沉浸式互动阅读与内容原型验证。
summary.en: An AI-powered interactive novel generator built with React/Vite, where users pick a genre and steer the plot through branching choices. To reduce LLM formatting failures, it parses responses via robust keyword markers instead of strict JSON. The app maintains in-session reading history and introduces “structure thinking” (outline planning and periodic recalibration) plus lightweight user preference analysis to adapt future scenes and options. Ideal for interactive fiction prototyping, narrative UX demos, and experimenting with OpenAI-compatible chat completion endpoints.

metadata.name: TrendRadar
metadata.description: ⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 +  RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 智能筛选新闻 + AI 翻译 +  AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测等。支持 Docker ，数据本地/云端自持。集成微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram/邮件/ntfy/bark/slack 等渠道智能推送。

summary.zh: 可自托管的 AI 舆情趋势监控器，聚合多平台热榜与 RSS，按关键词筛选降噪。内置 AI 翻译与摘要简报，支持 MCP 对话式情感洞察与趋势分析。Docker 快速部署，微信/飞书/Telegram 等多渠道推送，数据自持。
summary.en: A self-hosted AI-driven public opinion and trend monitoring system that aggregates multi-platform hot lists and RSS feeds, then filters noise with precise keyword rules. It generates translated, LLM-based digests and smart alerts, pushing insights to multiple channels (WeChat, Feishu, DingTalk, Telegram, email, Slack, etc.). With MCP integration, it enables conversational analysis, sentiment insights, and trend forecasting. Deploy fast via Docker or GitHub Pages while keeping full data ownership locally or in your own cloud.

summary.zh: 该仓库仅包含一句“bye~”的极简README，暂无源码与项目结构信息。更像用于账号/流程测试、仓库初始化或占位展示的空项目，可作为创建新仓库时的最小模板，后续再逐步补齐代码、CI、版本发布与文档规范。
summary.en: This repository is essentially empty: the README contains only a short “bye~” message and there is no visible source code, documentation structure, or build configuration. In practice, it looks like a placeholder repo used for account verification, workflow testing, repository initialization, or a minimal public marker. It can serve as a bootstrap starting point where you later add actual code, CI pipelines, release automation, and standard project documentation.

metadata.name: ioe
metadata.description: One-Stop Retail Inventory Solution

summary.zh: IOE基于Django的一站式零售库存系统，集商品/库存/盘点/收银销售/会员积分与报表分析于一体，支持多支付、低库存预警、审计权限与Docker部署，适用于门店与小仓库数字化管理。
summary.en: IOE is a Django-based, one-stop inventory management system tailored for retail stores and small warehouses. It covers product cataloging, real-time stock tracking, inbound/outbound adjustments, and structured stocktaking with review and discrepancy reports. Built-in POS-style sales flows support multiple payment methods, discounts, and returns. Membership features include tiers, points, balance top-ups, and purchase history. Analytics dashboards provide sales trends, inventory health, and profit insights, with role-based access control, audit logs, and Docker-ready deployment.

metadata.name: One-click-cleaning-of-C-drive
metadata.description: 只需轻松一点，即可安全高效的清理C盘残留和垃圾，并且对电脑毫无危险

summary.zh: 面向Windows的免安装C盘清理工具，提供一键扫描/清理临时文件、缓存、更新残留、日志等，并支持大文件定位。通过模拟预览、路径安全校验与自动备份/恢复机制降低误删风险，适用于C盘空间紧张、系统维护与日常垃圾治理场景。Python实现，MIT开源，支持7/8/10/11。
summary.en: An open-source, portable Windows C drive cleaner that scans and removes temp files, caches, update leftovers, logs, and more, plus a large-file finder to quickly locate space hogs. Unlike risky cleaners, it emphasizes safety with a dry-run preview mode, protected-path checks, and automatic backup/restore before deletion. Built in Python under the MIT license, it targets routine maintenance and low-disk-space troubleshooting on Windows 7/8/10/11.

metadata.name: LibreTV
metadata.description: 一分钟搭建影视站，支持Vercel/Docker等部署方式

summary.zh: LibreTV 是轻量级在线视频搜索与播放平台，聚合多源并通过服务端 HLS 代理实现跨端顺畅播放；兼容苹果CMS V10接口，免注册且可用环境变量密码保护，一键部署到 Vercel/Netlify/Cloudflare/Render 或 Docker，适合快速自建私有影视站与流媒体代理技术学习。
summary.en: LibreTV is a lightweight video search-and-watch platform that aggregates multiple third-party sources and delivers smoother playback via a server-side HLS proxy. It requires no registration, supports optional password protection through an environment variable, and can be deployed in minutes on Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare Pages/Functions, Render, or Docker. The project is compatible with Apple CMS V10 APIs, making it easy to plug in custom content providers. Ideal for quickly running a private streaming portal and learning serverless streaming proxy patterns.

metadata.name: weekly
metadata.description: 科技爱好者周刊，每周五发布

summary.zh: 面向开发者的中文科技周刊，每周五精选文章、工具与资源，提供可检索的 Markdown 长期归档；通过 GitHub Issues 投稿与讨论形成开放编辑流程，并附长期免费的“谁在招人”招聘帖，适合技术学习与趋势跟踪。
summary.en: Ruanyf/weekly is a long-running Chinese tech digest published every Friday. Each issue curates high-signal links across software engineering, AI, products, security, and the wider tech industry, with brief commentary and a stable Markdown archive for search and reuse. Submissions and discussions are crowdsourced via GitHub Issues, effectively turning the repo into an open editorial workflow. It also hosts a popular “Who’s hiring” thread as a free job board for developers and interns. Ideal for staying current and discovering tools.

metadata.name: Folo
metadata.description: 🧡 Folo is the AI RSS Reader

summary.zh: Folo 是面向资讯订阅的 AI 阅读器，聚合 RSS/网站/社媒内容，自动摘要、翻译与要点提取，支持跨端同步与离线阅读，帮助用户高效消化信息流并构建个人知识库，提供收藏、标签与搜索。
summary.en: Folo is an AI-powered reader built for information subscription. It aggregates content from RSS feeds, websites, and social sources, then uses AI to generate concise summaries, extract key points, and assist with translation for faster comprehension. With cross-device syncing across mobile and desktop, it fits daily reading workflows from quick scans to deep dives. Offline access, saving, tagging, and search help turn noisy streams into a personal, searchable knowledge base for ongoing learning and research.

summary.zh: LLMAI-writer 是面向小说写作的 AI 工作台，覆盖从大纲、人物到章节生成与润色的全流程。内置提示词模板与上下文感知生成，支持章节拖拽排序与自动编号。兼容 GPT/Claude/Gemini 及 DeepSeek、SiliconFlow、Ollama 本地模型，并提供知识库导入与向量检索、人物关系图与统计分析，适合长篇连载与团队规划。
summary.en: LLMAI-writer is an AI-assisted novel writing workstation that supports the full pipeline: outline planning, character design, chapter drafting, analysis, and polishing. It provides prompt templates, context-aware chapter generation across neighboring chapters, drag-and-drop structure management, and automatic numbering. The tool integrates multiple LLM providers (OpenAI GPT, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini) plus DeepSeek/ModelScope, SiliconFlow, and local Ollama models via OpenAI-compatible APIs with streaming output. It also includes a RAG-style knowledge base with embeddings and vector search, character relationship visualization, and writing statistics for long-form projects.

metadata.name: MTranServer
metadata.description: Offline translation model server with low resource consumption, fast speed, and private deployment capability. 低资源占用速度快可私有部署的离线翻译模型服务器

summary.zh: MTranServer是无需显卡的离线翻译服务端，首次自动拉取模型后平均50ms响应。支持Windows/Mac/Linux桌面一键启动与Docker/npm部署，适合内网与隐私场景的无限免费翻译，并提供DeepL/沉浸式等插件兼容API。
summary.en: MTranServer is an ultra-lightweight offline machine translation server designed for fast, private, self-hosted deployment without a GPU. After the first run auto-downloads and loads language-pair models, typical requests respond in about 50 ms. It offers one-click desktop apps for Windows/macOS/Linux, plus npm and Docker Compose deployments. The service targets local and intranet use cases where data privacy matters and costs must be controlled, and it exposes compatible endpoints for DeepL, DeepLX, Immersive Translate, and other translation plugins.

metadata.name: get_jobs
metadata.description: 💼【AI找工作助手】全平台自动投简历脚本：(boss、前程无忧、猎聘、智联招聘)

summary.zh: 基于JDK21+Selenium的全平台自动投简历工具，覆盖Boss直聘/前程无忧/猎聘/智联。提供Web GUI配置、自动下载Chromedriver与长Cookie登录；支持AI评估岗位匹配度并生成个性化招呼语（Boss）、投递过滤与企业黑名单、企业微信实时推送，显著提升批量投递效率与命中率。
summary.en: Get Jobs is a Java 21 (Gradle) automation assistant for submitting resumes across major Chinese job platforms (Boss Zhipin, 51job, Liepin, Zhilian). Built on Selenium with auto ChromeDriver handling and long-lived cookie sessions, it reduces repetitive manual steps. A web-based GUI centralizes configuration and execution. Key capabilities include AI-based JD matching and personalized greeting generation (Boss), smart filters for inactive HR/headhunters/salary targets, auto-updated company blacklists, and real-time WeCom webhook notifications for delivery status.

metadata.name: Gemini-Token-Manager
metadata.description: 一个用于管理 Gemini API 令牌的负载均衡服务，支持 Docker 部署和数据持久化

summary.zh: Gemini Token Manager 提供多令牌池与轮询负载均衡，内置 Google GenAI/OpenAI 代理与 SSE 流式转发，支持批量导入/检测/导出密钥与请求日志审计；提供 REST 接口与管理 UI，Docker 部署并持久化数据，环境变量可配置。
summary.en: Gemini Token Manager is a Node.js service that manages a pool of Gemini API tokens and distributes traffic via load balancing. It offers a RESTful API and an admin UI, supports Docker deployment with persistent storage, and auto-initializes data files. The enhanced proxy layer can forward Google GenAI and OpenAI API requests, including SSE streaming responses, with detailed request/response logging and better error handling. It also includes bulk key operations such as import, delete, validation, and selective export.

metadata.name: RedNote-MCP
metadata.description: 🚀MCP server for accessing RedNote(XiaoHongShu, xhs).

summary.zh: RedNote-MCP 是面向小红书（XHS）的 MCP Server，基于 Playwright 自动化登录并持久化 Cookie，向 Cursor 等 MCP 客户端提供笔记关键词搜索与按 URL 抓取内容能力。适用于让 AI 助手安全接入小红书进行检索、摘要与内容分析，支持命令行初始化与 stdio 通信，便于本地部署集成。
summary.en: RedNote-MCP is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for accessing RedNote (XiaoHongShu/XHS). It uses Playwright to automate interactive login and persists cookies for authenticated access. The server exposes tools for keyword-based note search and fetching note content by URL, designed to integrate with MCP clients like Cursor over stdio. It’s suited for letting AI assistants retrieve, summarize, and analyze XHS content via a local, scriptable CLI workflow.

metadata.name: ACL4SSR
metadata.description: clashverge Script/ clash ACL/ clash script

summary.zh: 基于 ACL4SSR 二次定制的 Clash/ClashVerge 分流规则与脚本，整合去广告、GFWList 与规则碎片，可直接粘贴到 ClashVerge 全局扩展或指定订阅脚本。并补充 IPv6 规则与分组，便于按场景精细路由、统一管理与持续维护。
summary.en: A personalized fork of ACL4SSR providing curated rule sets and a ClashVerge Script for Clash-based clients. It bundles ad-blocking rules, GFWList routing, and reusable rule fragments, and can be pasted directly into ClashVerge global extensions or per-subscription scripts. The project also adds IPv6-specific rules and dedicated policy groups, enabling finer traffic steering across common scenarios while keeping configuration maintainable and easy to iterate for daily proxy usage.

metadata.name: JD-AutomatedTools
metadata.description: 👏JD personal order information crawling. | 京东个人订单信息爬取。👏 JD order automation evaluation, are given five-star praise, picture and text. | 京东订单自动化评价，均给予五星好评以及图文。👏 Get cookies after login jd.com. | 登录京东后获取cookie。

summary.zh: 面向京东账号的自动化工具集，涵盖模拟登录与Cookies管理、个人订单信息爬取与持久化导出，以及订单自动五星图文评价。适用于个人订单数据备份、消费分析与操作提效，模块化脚本设计便于按需组合与二次开发。
summary.en: A modular automation toolkit for JD.com accounts, providing simulated login and cookie/session management, personal order crawling with persistence/export, and automated order reviews that post five-star ratings with text and images. It targets personal data backup, order analytics, and workflow efficiency. Components are separated into focused scripts (login manager, data exporter, auto evaluator) so users can integrate only what they need and extend it for custom pipelines or automation tasks.

metadata.name: cursor-auto-register
metadata.description: cursor-auto-register

summary.zh: Python 实现的 Cursor 账号自动注册与管理服务，集成 tempmail 临时邮箱与 Cloudflare Catch-all 转发，驱动无头 Chrome 完成注册流程；基于 FastAPI 提供账号创建、随机取号、列表查询与健康检查，并内置可视化 UI/Swagger 文档；使用 SQLite（aiosqlite）持久化账号数据，便于本地部署与调试。
summary.en: A Python-based service for automated Cursor account registration and lifecycle management. It integrates tempmail.plus disposable mailboxes with Cloudflare catch-all forwarding to receive verification emails, then drives a headless Chrome workflow to complete sign-up. Built on FastAPI, it exposes endpoints to create accounts, list all accounts, fetch a random account, and perform health checks, plus an optional built-in UI and OpenAPI docs (Swagger/ReDoc). Account data is persisted via SQLite using aiosqlite for easy local development and debugging.

metadata.name: deep-research
metadata.description: Use any LLMs (Large Language Models) for Deep Research. Support SSE API and MCP server.

summary.zh: Deep Research 以多LLM编排+联网检索在约2分钟生成深度研究报告，支持Thinking/Task分工、分阶段再研究、知识库与知识图谱。基于Next.js PWA，可部署Vercel/Cloudflare，数据本地存储，并提供SSE流式API与MCP服务器接入。
summary.en: Deep Research is a privacy-first deep research app that orchestrates multiple LLMs and web search to produce detailed reports in minutes. It separates “Thinking” and “Task” models to balance depth and speed, supports iterative re-research from any stage, and adds local knowledge base ingestion plus one-click knowledge graph generation. Built as a Next.js PWA, it deploys easily to Vercel or Cloudflare. It also exposes SSE streaming APIs and an MCP server, enabling integration with external tools and agent workflows.

summary.zh: 基于 Next.js 14 与 TypeScript 的 FAL.AI Web 界面，面向文生图等 AI 服务提供可视化调用与实时处理。内置 API Key 管理、Server Proxy 安全转发与限流，结合 RSC/流式响应与图片优化，适合个人创作、团队快速验证与在 Vercel 上部署 AI 工具前端。
summary.en: A modern Next.js 14 + TypeScript web UI for interacting with FAL.AI services (e.g., image generation) through a clean, responsive interface. It focuses on secure API key handling, a server-side proxy to prevent credential exposure, and built-in rate limiting. Performance is enhanced with React Server Components, streaming responses for long-running AI jobs, lazy loading, and optimized image delivery. Ideal for creators and teams who want a deployable front-end to quickly prototype and operate FAL.AI-powered workflows on Vercel.
tags_zh: 流式 AI 推理 UI

metadata.name: DiffRhythm
metadata.description: Di♪♪Rhythm: Blazingly Fast and Embarrassingly Simple End-to-End Full-Length Song Generation with Latent Diffusion

summary.zh: DiffRhythm 是首个开源潜空间扩散模型，可端到端在约285秒生成全长歌曲；支持文本风格提示、纯音乐、续写与编辑，v1.2提升音质与配器并缓解重复遗漏，适用于音乐创作、产品原型与音乐AIGC研究。
summary.en: DiffRhythm is the first open-sourced diffusion-based music model able to generate full-length songs end-to-end, delivering a complete track in about 285 seconds via latent diffusion. It supports text-based style prompts without audio references, instrumental-only generation, and structured song continuation/editing. Version 1.2 improves arrangement richness, audio quality, and reduces repetition/omission artifacts. The project targets rapid music creation workflows, product prototyping, and research on controllable, structure-aware generative music systems.

metadata.name: wasp
metadata.description: The batteries-included full-stack framework for the AI era. Develop JS/TS web apps (React, Node.js, and Prisma) using declarative code that abstracts away complex full-stack features like auth, background jobs, RPC, email sending, end-to-end type safety, single-command deployment, and more.

summary.zh: Wasp是面向AI时代的“电池齐全”全栈框架，用声明式.wasp规范串联React、Node.js与Prisma，内置认证、RPC、任务队列、邮件、端到端类型安全与一键部署，显著减少样板并支持任意平台部署，适合快速交付生产级Web应用。
summary.en: Wasp (Web Application Specification) is a batteries-included, Rails-like full-stack framework for building JS/TS web apps with React, Node.js, and Prisma. You describe the app via a declarative .wasp spec and implement only business logic in React/Node, while Wasp generates and connects auth, RPC, background jobs, email sending, end-to-end type safety, and smart caching/invalidation. It optimizes for fast production delivery with minimal boilerplate, single-command deployment, and no provider lock-in, giving AI agents clearer structure and guardrails.

metadata.name: tuboshu
metadata.description: Transform Your Favorite Websites into Seamless Desktop Experiences✨!   把常用的网站集合到一个桌面程序里。

summary.zh: Tuboshu 是基于 Electron 的网页转桌面应用工具，可将常用网站一键封装为独立客户端。支持多开与账户隔离、全局快捷键快速呼出/隐藏，并提供窗口尺寸、图标、快捷键与 JS 注入等深度定制。可打包为跨平台可执行文件，配置本地存储，适合多站点工作台、运营多账号与开发调试容器场景。
summary.en: Tuboshu is an Electron-based tool that turns any website into a standalone desktop app with one click. It supports multi-instance launching with account isolation, global hotkeys for instant show/hide, and deep customization including window sizing, icons, shortcuts, and JavaScript injection. Apps can be packaged as executables for Windows, macOS, and Linux, with privacy-friendly local-only configuration storage. Ideal for multi-site workspaces, multi-account operations, and lightweight web container setups.

metadata.name: flutter_in_action_2nd
metadata.description: 《Flutter实战 第二版》 书稿

summary.zh: 《Flutter实战·第二版》书稿与在线电子书，系统讲解Flutter从入门到进阶与实战：组件布局、事件动画、自定义组件、网络文件、国际化及框架原理，并以简版GitHub App串联流程，提供大量示例与配套源码。
summary.en: Manuscript and online e-book for “Flutter in Action (2nd Edition)”, updated regularly and written to take developers from fundamentals to advanced practice. It covers Flutter/Dart UI construction with core widgets and layout, event handling and gestures, animations, custom components, file and network I/O, internationalization, and deeper Flutter framework internals. A simplified GitHub client app serves as a capstone to connect topics into a realistic end-to-end development flow. Rich examples and illustrations are included, with companion code planned after the draft is finalized.

metadata.name: LuminaBrush
metadata.description: Illumination Drawing Tools for Text-to-Image Diffusion Models

summary.zh: LuminaBrush 是面向文生图扩散模型的交互式“打光绘制”工具，用户用涂鸦即可控制光照效果。框架采用两阶段：先将任意图像转为“均匀光”中间表示，再在其上生成可控照明，降低学习难度并稳定行为。数据流程通过随机法线合成重光与海量配对数据训练；均匀光阶段还能独立用于图像去光照/提亮。
summary.en: LuminaBrush is an interactive illumination-drawing tool for text-to-image diffusion workflows, enabling users to steer lighting with simple scribbles. It uses a two-stage design: first normalizing an input image into a “uniformly-lit” representation, then synthesizing user-guided illumination effects on top of it. This decomposition simplifies learning and improves stability versus a single-stage lighting model. Training leverages relighting via synthesized random normals and large-scale paired data mined from in-the-wild images. The uniform-lit stage can also serve as a standalone delighting/lighting-normalization utility.

metadata.name: vue-idle-xiuxian
metadata.description: 修仙放置游戏: 我的放置仙途

summary.zh: 基于 Vue3+Vite+Pinia+Naive UI 的修仙题材放置游戏《我的放置仙途》，提供角色、奇遇、探索、背包、成就、灵宠/装备养成、炼丹、抽奖与 GM/数据管理等完整闭环。适用于前端放置游戏原型、数值与系统设计验证，并支持 NPM 与 Docker-Compose 快速部署。
summary.en: A Vue 3 idle cultivation game template built with Vite, Pinia, and Naive UI. It delivers a full gameplay loop: character progression, encounters, exploration, inventory, achievements, pets and gear with upgrade paths, alchemy, gacha, plus GM tools and data management. Ideal for prototyping idle games and validating system/economy design, with both NPM and Docker-Compose deployment options.

metadata.name: chinese-independent-developer
metadata.description: 👩🏿‍💻👨🏾‍💻👩🏼‍💻👨🏽‍💻👩🏻‍💻中国独立开发者项目列表 -- 分享大家都在做什么

summary.zh: 该仓库以清单形式聚合中国独立开发者的 Web 与 App 产品，按“开发中/已上线/停更”标注状态，并拆分主版面、程序员版面与游戏版面便于检索。适合灵感获取、竞品调研与项目曝光；通过 PR/Issue 机制社区共建，持续更新可用产品索引。
summary.en: This repository curates a living directory of products built by Chinese independent developers, focusing on ready-to-use websites and apps (not dev tools or forum-style sites). Entries are labeled by lifecycle status—building, launched, or unmaintained—and organized into main, programmer, and game editions for quick discovery. It helps makers find inspiration, run market/competitor research, and gain lightweight exposure. Contributions are crowdsourced via pull requests and issues. Each item links to the creator and product page for fast scanning.

metadata.name: OpenClawChineseTranslation
metadata.description: 🦞 OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot) 汉化版 - 开源个人 AI 助手中文版 | Claude/ChatGPT LLM 接入 | WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord 多平台 | 每小时自动同步 | CLI + Dashboard 全中文 | 全流程搭建教程，以及排错指南！

summary.zh: 该仓库是 OpenClaw 的深度汉化发行版，提供全中文 CLI 与 Dashboard，接入 Claude/ChatGPT 兼容模型，并支持 WhatsApp、Telegram、Discord 等多平台交互。项目保持每小时同步上游更新，附带 Docker、安装排错与运维文档，显著降低中文用户部署个人 AI 助手门槛。
summary.en: This repository is a Chinese-localized distribution of OpenClaw, an open-source personal AI assistant platform. It delivers a fully translated CLI and dashboard, supports OpenAI-compatible LLM access such as Claude and ChatGPT, and integrates with WhatsApp, Telegram, and Discord for conversational interaction. A notable strength is its hourly upstream sync, keeping the localization closely aligned with official updates. The repo also includes Docker deployment guides, setup walkthroughs, and troubleshooting documentation, making self-hosted AI assistant deployment much more accessible for Chinese-speaking users.

metadata.name: awesome-openclaw-usecases
metadata.description: A community collection of OpenClaw use cases for making life easier.

summary.zh: 该仓库聚焦 OpenClaw 的真实落地场景，汇集社媒摘要、内容生产、多代理协作、DevOps 与个人效率等实践案例。其价值在于降低 AI Agent 采用门槛，帮助用户从“会不会用”转向“能解决什么问题”，并强调技能、插件与外部依赖的安全审查。
summary.en: This repository is a curated collection of real-world OpenClaw use cases, covering social media digests, content production, multi-agent workflows, DevOps automation, and personal productivity. Its core value is not teaching isolated skills, but showing how OpenClaw can solve concrete everyday problems and accelerate adoption of AI agents. A notable strength is its practical, scenario-driven organization, paired with explicit security warnings around community-built skills, plugins, permissions, and third-party dependencies.

metadata.name: airi
metadata.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

summary.zh: AIRI 是面向个人部署的 AI 虚拟陪伴框架，目标复现 Neuro-sama 式数字角色体验。项目支持实时语音对话、角色人格承载与跨平台运行，并可接入 Minecraft、Factorio 等游戏场景，适用于虚拟主播、桌面伴侣与交互式智能体开发。
summary.en: AIRI is a self-hosted AI companion framework designed to recreate a Neuro-sama-like virtual character experience under the user's own control. It combines persona-driven interaction, realtime voice chat, and cross-platform delivery across web, macOS, and Windows. A notable strength is its ability to operate inside game environments such as Minecraft and Factorio, making it suitable for virtual streamers, interactive digital companions, embodied AI experiments, and multimodal agent applications that blend conversation, presence, and gameplay.

metadata.name: cc-plugin
metadata.description: (WIP) toeknroll cc-plugin

summary.zh: 该仓库是面向 Claude Code 的实验性插件，以 llmdoc 与 SubAgent RAG 组合缓解 AI 编码代理的“上下文地板”问题。它通过文档优先检索、任务调查代理和自动文档维护，降低主代理 token 消耗，缩短理解代码库的准备时间，适用于大型代码库、生产级协作开发与持续演进场景。
summary.en: TokenRoll cc-plugin is an experimental Claude Code plugin designed to address the “context floor” problem in AI coding workflows. It combines an LLM-oriented documentation structure, llmdoc, with SubAgent RAG to help agents understand large codebases faster and with fewer main-agent tokens. The plugin enforces documentation-first investigation, decomposed task analysis, and post-task doc maintenance, making it especially useful for production repositories, long-lived engineering teams, and codebases where context acquisition speed and relevance directly impact development efficiency.

metadata.name: openpencil
metadata.description: The world's first open-source AI-native vector design tool and the first to feature concurrent Agent Teams. Design-as-Code. Turn prompts into UI directly on the live canvas. A modern alternative to Pencil.

summary.zh: OpenPencil 是面向 UI/原型设计的开源 AI 原生矢量工具，将提示词、画布编辑与代码生成整合为统一工作流。其并发 Agent Teams 可拆解复杂页面并行生成，内置 MCP Server 支持终端自动化读写设计文件，适合设计协作、快速原型与设计到前端代码落地。
summary.en: OpenPencil is an open-source, AI-native vector design tool for UI and prototyping that unifies prompting, live-canvas editing, and code generation in one workflow. Its standout capability is concurrent Agent Teams, which decompose complex layouts into parallel design tasks for faster generation. With a built-in MCP server, it also enables terminal-driven automation for reading and modifying design files. The project is well suited for rapid prototyping, design collaboration, and turning interface concepts into frontend-ready code.

metadata.name: TavilyProxyManager
metadata.description: 一个透明的 Tavily API 反向代理：将多个 Tavily API Key（额度/credits）汇聚在一个 Master Key 之后，并提供内置 Web UI 用于管理 Key、用量与请求日志。

summary.zh: TavilyProxyManager 是面向 Tavily API 的透明反向代理与管理中台，通过 Master Key 聚合多个 Tavily Key 额度，支持智能选路、限流/鉴权失败自动切换，并内置 Web UI 查看 Key 状态、用量趋势与请求日志。项目以 Go 单文件部署，兼容 MCP 接入 Claude、VS Code 等 AI 工具，适合统一出口、额度池化和运维可视化场景。
summary.en: TavilyProxyManager is a transparent reverse proxy and control plane for the Tavily API. It aggregates multiple Tavily API keys behind a single Master Key, enabling centralized access, quota pooling, and simplified client integration. The system includes smart key selection, automatic failover on authentication or rate-limit errors, detailed request logging, usage analytics, and a built-in web dashboard for operations. Built as a single Go binary with an embedded Vue-based UI, it also exposes an MCP endpoint, making it practical for Claude, VS Code, and other AI tooling workflows.

metadata.name: PUAClaw
metadata.description: Claw 们终将接管世界，PUAClaw is All You Need

summary.zh: PUAClaw 是一个以戏谑学术风格整理 LLM 提示词说服/操控技巧的知识库，围绕 PPE-T 分类、龙虾评级、模板与兼容性矩阵，系统梳理 16 大类 96 子技术，适合用于提示工程观察、案例分析与安全研究讨论。
summary.en: PUAClaw is a satirical yet well-structured knowledge base for analyzing persuasive and manipulative prompting techniques used with LLMs. Framed like a mock academic standard, it defines a PPE-T taxonomy, lobster-based ratings, prompt templates, and cross-agent compatibility matrices. The repository organizes 16 major categories and 96 sub-techniques, making it useful for prompt engineering analysis, incident retrospectives such as the Windsurf case, and broader AI safety or prompt behavior research discussions.

metadata.name: jshookmcp
metadata.description: js hook toolkit that all you need

summary.zh: jshookmcp 是面向 AI 辅助 JavaScript 与安全分析的 MCP 服务器，内置 244 个工具，覆盖浏览器自动化、CDP 调试、网络抓包、JS Hook、WASM、AST 与加密分析等场景。其亮点在于插件/工作流可扩展、复合任务编排与 LLM 驱动代码理解，适合逆向、漏洞研究与自动化分析。
summary.en: jshookmcp is an MCP server for AI-assisted JavaScript analysis and security research, bundling 244 tools across browser automation, CDP debugging, network capture, JavaScript hooking, WASM tooling, AST transforms, and crypto analysis. Its main strengths are runtime extensibility through plugins and workflows, high-level composite orchestration, and LLM-powered code understanding. It is especially suitable for reverse engineering, web application analysis, vulnerability research, and automated investigation pipelines that need both low-level runtime insight and repeatable multi-step workflows.

metadata.name: waoowaoo
metadata.description: 首家工业级全流程 AI 影视生产平台。Industry-first professional AI Agent platform for controllable film & video production. From shorts to live-action with Hollywood-standard workflows.

summary.zh: waoowaoo 是面向短剧、漫画视频与真人影视的 AI 制作平台，打通小说解析、角色场景生成、分镜合成与多角色配音全流程。基于 Next.js、Prisma、BullMQ 等构建，强调可控创作、工业化流程与本地 Docker 快速部署。
summary.en: waoowaoo is an AI film and video production platform for short dramas, comic-style videos, and live-action workflows. It connects the full pipeline from story parsing and character/scene generation to storyboard video composition and multi-character voice synthesis. Built with Next.js, Prisma, Redis, and BullMQ, it highlights controllable creation, production-oriented orchestration, multilingual usability, and fast self-hosted deployment through Docker.

metadata.name: config_GUI
metadata.description: 对codex的config做一个简单的可视化

summary.zh: 这是一个面向 Windows 的 Rust 桌面工具，用可视化方式编辑 Codex CLI 的 config.toml。它支持导入现有配置、合并保存并保留未知项，避免误删 mcp_servers 等内容；同时提供三态布尔、数组与 TOML 片段输入、模板说明和中文字体适配，适合降低命令行配置门槛。
summary.en: A Rust-based Windows desktop GUI for editing Codex CLI’s config.toml without hand-writing TOML. It is designed for users who want safer configuration changes, especially when existing files contain custom sections such as mcp_servers. The tool supports importing current settings, merge-save to preserve unknown fields, tri-state booleans, array and raw TOML fragment input, template-driven field descriptions, and quick filling for examples or enum values. It also attempts automatic Chinese font loading on Windows, helping reduce configuration errors in localized daily Codex CLI usage.

metadata.name: ClawDeckX
metadata.description: Complexity within, simplicity without. 繁于内，简于形。

summary.zh: ClawDeckX 是面向 OpenClaw 的开源 Web 可视化管理平台，以接近 macOS 的精致界面封装安装、配置、监控与优化流程。它提供模板化引导、深度参数编辑、实时观测、多语言与本地/远程网关管理，显著降低多智能体系统的上手与运维门槛。
summary.en: ClawDeckX is an open-source web-based visual management platform purpose-built for OpenClaw. It streamlines installation, configuration, monitoring, and optimization through a polished macOS-inspired interface, guided setup flows, and prebuilt templates. The platform also exposes advanced controls for model switching, memory, plugins, and routing, while adding real-time observability, multilingual support, responsive design, and local/remote gateway management. It is especially valuable for beginners and teams managing multi-agent workflows without relying on complex command-line operations.

metadata.name: best-skills
metadata.description: 通用高质量 Skills 合集🔥

summary.zh: 面向 Cursor、Claude Code 等 Agent 的通用 Skills 合集，按 SKILL.md 的 description 关键词自动触发调用。覆盖论文写作/润色与引用、答辩PPT与 Draw.io 图表生成、代码文档与架构/ER/数据结构图、五步开发工作流及自媒体图文创作，降低手动提示成本，提升产出一致性。
summary.en: A curated collection of high-quality, agent-ready skills for tools like Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex. Unlike copy‑paste prompts, each SKILL.md is discovered and invoked automatically via description keywords and trigger scenarios. It covers thesis writing and de-AI polishing, BibTeX citations, defense slide decks and Draw.io diagrams, code-driven docs and architecture/ER/data-structure charts, a five-step dev workflow (requirements to bug-fix), plus WeChat-style article and cover/image generation for creators.
tags_zh: 论文写作与开发工作流

metadata.name: grok2api
metadata.description: Grok2API 是一个基于 FastAPI 构建的 Grok 网关，支持将 Grok Web 能力以 OpenAI 兼容 API 的方式转换。

summary.zh: Grok2API基于FastAPI重构Grok能力，提供OpenAI兼容接口，覆盖流式/非流式对话、工具调用、图像生成/编辑与文/图生视频。内置号池并发、自动负载均衡、NSFW一键切换及管理面板，适合自建统一模型网关与多模态应用快速接入。
summary.en: Grok2API is a FastAPI-based gateway that exposes Grok capabilities through an OpenAI-compatible API. It supports streaming and non-streaming chat, tool/function calling, image generation and editing, and text-/image-to-video generation (including upscaling). The project also bundles an admin panel, token pool management with concurrent scheduling, automatic load balancing, and one-click NSFW mode toggling. It’s well-suited for teams who want to self-host a unified LLM endpoint and integrate Grok into existing OpenAI-style clients and multimodal products.

metadata.name: OpenMOSS
metadata.description: A self-organizing multi-agent collaboration platform for OpenClaw. Multiple AI agents work as an autonomous team — planning, executing, reviewing, and patrolling tasks with zero human intervention.

summary.zh: OpenMOSS基于OpenClaw的自组织多智能体平台，Planner/Executor/Reviewer/Patrol以cron唤醒协作，自动拆解任务、执行交付、评审返工与巡检恢复，配评分激励与WebUI。适用于无人值守运维、持续内容生产、代码生成与任务流水线。
summary.en: OpenMOSS is a self-organizing multi-agent collaboration platform built on OpenClaw. Four roles—Planner, Executor, Reviewer, and Patrol—wake up via cron, autonomously claim tasks, plan and execute work, run closed-loop review/scoring with rework, and continuously patrol for stuck jobs with recovery actions. It provides a WebUI and pluggable Skills so orchestration is decoupled from domain capabilities. Best suited for zero-human-intervention pipelines such as continuous ops automation, recurring content production, and autonomous coding workflows.

metadata.name: openclaw-websearch-plugin
metadata.description: 为 OpenClaw 提供联网搜索能力的插件。通过飞书 / Telegram等 向 Agent 发消息，即可触发搜索、抓取网页、映射站点结构。

summary.zh: 为OpenClaw提供原生联网搜索插件：消息触发Tavily快搜、Grok深搜与双引擎合并，并支持批量网页抓取和站点结构映射。TypeScript直加载+JSON Schema校验，内置Tavily多Key自动轮转，兼容OpenAI中转站，显著降低搜索耗时至15–40秒。
summary.en: An OpenClaw plugin that adds native online search capabilities via Feishu/Telegram/WeCom messages. It exposes five structured tools: Tavily fast search, Grok deep search with citations, dual-engine parallel search, lightweight web fetching, and site structure mapping. Implemented as a first-class Plugin Tool (api.registerTool) with JSON Schema validation and robust error handling. It removes heavy browser automation, supports OpenAI-compatible relay endpoints for Grok, and includes built-in Tavily multi-key rotation to mitigate 401/429 limits, cutting search latency to ~15–40 seconds.
tags_zh: 结构化抓取与站点映射

metadata.name: UltimateSearchSkill
metadata.description: Dual-engine web search Skill for OpenClaw/Pi: Grok AI + Tavily + FireCrawl

summary.zh: 面向OpenClaw/Pi的双引擎搜索Skill：Grok+Tavily并行检索交叉验证；grok2api与TavilyProxy聚合多Token/Key负载均衡；web-fetch用TavilyExtract→FireCrawl自动降级；集成FlareSolverr刷新cf_clearance，纯Shell零MCP并强化本地安全。
summary.en: UltimateSearchSkill is a dual-engine web-search skill for OpenClaw/Pi agents. It runs Grok online search via grok2api and structured Tavily search via TavilyProxyManager in parallel, then cross-validates results. Multiple SSO tokens and API keys are pooled for automatic load balancing and quota smoothing. Page fetching uses a staged fallback (Tavily Extract → FireCrawl Scrape) to improve robustness. FlareSolverr is bundled to bypass Cloudflare and refresh cf_clearance automatically. Everything is driven by shell scripts, avoiding MCP dependencies and enforcing localhost-bound, authenticated admin endpoints.

summary.zh: 面向公众号、知乎、Word与社交平台的Markdown排版发布工作台，提供多主题多端预览、滚动同步与排版检测；重写知乎复制链路兼容公式/表格/代码，并支持PDF/HTML/Word导出及长文拆分社交卡片、PNG/ZIP交付。
summary.en: A Markdown formatting and publishing workstation built for real distribution workflows: WeChat Official Accounts, Zhihu, Word, and social platforms. It features clean rich-text paste to Markdown, multi-theme styling, responsive previews (mobile/tablet/desktop), scroll sync, and layout metrics. The Zhihu pipeline is rewritten as “Markdown → Zhihu-specific HTML” to preserve formulas, tables, code blocks, and links, with a fallback import path. It also exports PDF/HTML/Docx and includes a card studio to split long posts and batch export PNG/ZIP assets.

summary.zh: 面向 AI Coding 工作流的“配方库”，汇集 Augment Context Engine MCP 跨平台配置指南与改造版 augment.mjs，支持代码库检索与提示增强；同时提供可复用 Codex Skills（任务跟踪、CSV 待办同步、技能创建/打包/校验）及 Python/Node 脚本模板，用于快速落地并标准化团队日常 AI 辅助开发流程。
summary.en: A hands-on cookbook for AI coding workflows, bundling cross-platform Augment Context Engine MCP setup docs and a customized augment.mjs enabling codebase retrieval and prompt enhancement. It also ships reusable Codex Skills for multi-step task tracking, CSV-based todo synchronization, and skill creation/packaging/metadata validation, plus Python/Node helper scripts and templates. Designed for developers and teams to quickly bootstrap configurations and standardize repeatable, AI-assisted development routines.

summary.zh: OpenClaw 的 Windows 一键安装器：无需预装 Node/Git/NPM，双击 EXE 即装。默认集成全部 Skills，并预设阿里源提升国内稳定性；提供中文汉化与英文原版两套内核，附一键卸载实现干净回滚。
summary.en: A Windows one-click installer for OpenClaw that bundles required runtime components so users don’t need to preinstall Node.js, Git, or NPM. It ships with all Skills enabled by default and applies an Aliyun mirror configuration to improve download speed and reliability in mainland China. Two editions are offered: a fully localized Chinese build based on OpenClawChineseTranslation and an official English build aligned with the latest core versions. An included uninstaller EXE supports clean removal without leftovers.

metadata.name: autoclip
metadata.description: AutoClip : AI-powered video clipping and highlight generation · 一款智能高光提取与剪辑的二创工具

summary.zh: AutoClip 是面向 YouTube、B站及本地视频的 AI 高光切片工具，结合通义千问做内容理解、精彩片段提取与合集生成。系统采用 FastAPI + Celery + Redis + React 架构，支持异步处理、实时进度回传、Web 可视化管理及 Docker 部署，适合二创剪辑、内容分发与批量视频运营场景。
summary.en: AutoClip is an AI-powered video clipping system for YouTube, Bilibili, and local media. It downloads videos, analyzes content with Tongyi Qianwen LLMs, detects highlight segments, and generates compilations automatically. Built with FastAPI, Celery, Redis, React, and TypeScript, it supports asynchronous processing, real-time progress updates via WebSocket, and a modern web interface. With Docker-ready deployment and scalable task orchestration, it fits creator workflows such as remix editing, highlight production, short-form repackaging, and batch video operation pipelines.

metadata.name: aigcpanel
metadata.description: AIGCPanel 是一个简单易用的一站式AI数字人系统，支持视频合成、声音合成、声音克隆，简化本地模型管理、一键导入和使用AI模型。

summary.zh: AIGCPanel 是面向本地部署场景的一站式 AI 数字人工具，集成视频换口型、语音合成、语音克隆与模型管理能力。项目基于 Electron、Vue3、TypeScript 构建，支持多类 TTS、ASR 与数字人模型一键导入启动，显著降低 AI 内容生产与桌面化交付门槛。
summary.en: AIGCPanel is an all-in-one AI digital human desktop system designed for local deployment and easy adoption. It combines lip-synced video generation, speech synthesis, voice cloning, and streamlined model management in a single interface. Built with Electron, Vue 3, and TypeScript, it supports one-click import and launch for multiple TTS, ASR, and avatar video models. The project is especially valuable for creators, demos, and applied AI production workflows that need a user-friendly cross-platform desktop experience.

metadata.name: cose
metadata.description: 😃 md 编辑器使用的浏览器扩展，支持一键将文章同步到多个内容平台。

summary.zh: COSE 是面向 doocs/md 的浏览器扩展，围绕“写一次、同步多处”实现 Markdown 文章一键分发到微信公众号、知乎、掘金等多个平台。其核心亮点是本地运行、隐私友好、自动检测登录状态、统一管理同步标签页，并尽量保留渲染样式，尤其适合技术作者、自媒体运营和多平台内容发布场景。
summary.en: COSE is a browser extension built for the doocs/md Markdown editor, enabling creators to publish once and sync content to multiple platforms such as WeChat Official Accounts, Zhihu, Juejin, and more. Its key strengths include fully local execution with no user data collection, automatic login-state detection, grouped tab management during publishing, and better style preservation during synchronization. It is especially useful for technical writers, content operators, and anyone managing multi-platform article distribution workflows.

summary.zh: MiniMax Skills 是面向 AI 编码代理的技能插件集合，可接入 Claude、Cursor、Codex，为前端、全栈、Android、iOS、Shader 及文档办公自动化提供结构化工程指导。其亮点在于统一封装生产级开发流程，并集成 MiniMax 多模态生成能力与 PDF、PPTX、XLSX、DOCX 等文件处理链路。
summary.en: MiniMax Skills is a plugin-style skill library for AI coding agents, designed to work with tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex. It delivers structured, production-oriented guidance across frontend, fullstack, Android, iOS, and GLSL shader development, while also covering document automation for PDF, PPTX, XLSX, and DOCX workflows. Key strengths include standardized engineering playbooks, multi-agent-friendly integration, and built-in support for MiniMax multimodal generation APIs for image, video, audio, and creative asset production.

metadata.name: gstack
metadata.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

summary.zh: gstack 将 Claude Code 封装为一套可复用的“AI 软件工厂”：以 15 个角色化命令覆盖产品规划、架构评审、设计把关、代码审查、浏览器 QA、安全审计与发布流程。它面向创始人和技术负责人，把个人开发升级为接近小团队协作的高产交付模式，强调 Markdown 驱动、命令化操作与 MIT 开源可扩展性。
summary.en: gstack turns Claude Code into an opinionated AI software factory with 15 role-based commands spanning product planning, architecture review, design critique, code review, browser-driven QA, security auditing, and release workflows. Built from Garry Tan’s personal setup, it targets founders, technical leaders, and first-time Claude Code users who want structured, team-like execution instead of blank prompting. Its key value is converting solo builders into high-throughput operators through Markdown-native workflows, slash-command automation, and an extensible MIT-licensed toolkit.

metadata.name: openclaw-search-skills
metadata.description: OpenClaw skills for deep search — multi-source search, content extraction, and structured research reports.

summary.zh: 该仓库为 OpenClaw 提供生产级深度检索能力：整合 Brave、Exa、Tavily、Grok 四源并行搜索，基于查询意图完成召回、评分与 research-light 增强；支持沿 GitHub、论坛与网页引用链持续深挖，并将普通网页、反爬页面及 PDF/Office 统一提取为 Markdown。
summary.en: OpenClaw Search Skills is a production-ready capability set for deep research agents. It combines parallel retrieval across Brave, Exa, Tavily, and Grok with intent-aware query planning, scoring, deduplication, and optional research-light enrichment. Instead of stopping at top-level results, it can follow citation and discussion threads across GitHub issues, PRs, forums, and articles to uncover evolving context. Its extraction pipeline also converts standard pages, anti-bot sites, PDFs, and Office files into clean Markdown through MinerU fallback, enabling structured research and high-fidelity reporting.

metadata.name: inkos
metadata.description: Autonomous novel writing AI Agent — agents write, audit, and revise novels with human review gates

summary.zh: InkOS 是面向长篇小说生产的命令行多 Agent 写作系统，以“写作—审计—修订”闭环自动生成章节，并通过人工审核关卡确保可控性。项目支持多模型路由、风格仿写、已有作品续写、同人创作与 EPUB 导出，重点强化连续性审计与去 AI 味改写，适合网文、类型文学和批量内容创作场景。
summary.en: InkOS is a CLI-based multi-agent system for long-form novel production, automating a full draft-audit-revision loop with human review gates for control. It supports multi-model routing, style imitation, continuation of existing novels, fanfiction workflows, and EPUB export. Its standout strengths are continuity auditing across many narrative dimensions and built-in anti-AI-style rewriting, making it well suited for web fiction, genre storytelling, and scalable creative writing pipelines.

metadata.name: codex-session-patcher
metadata.description: A lightweight Python tool to clean AI refusal responses from Codex CLI session files

summary.zh: 这是一个面向 Codex CLI 的轻量级本地 Python 修补工具，可自动定位并重写最新会话与记忆文件，清除拒绝性回复及相关推理字段，帮助中断任务恢复执行。项目以零依赖、自动备份、支持 dry-run 与 auto-resume 为亮点，适合需要维护本地 AI 会话连续性的开发者使用。
summary.en: Codex Session Patcher is a lightweight local Python utility for Codex CLI that rewrites session and memory files to remove refusal-style responses and related reasoning fields that can block workflow continuation. It automatically detects the latest session, creates backups before modification, supports dry-run inspection, and can resume Codex after patching. With zero external dependencies and a narrow focus on local session recovery, it is best suited for developers who need to restore continuity in interrupted AI-assisted terminal workflows.

metadata.name: xiaohu-wechat-format
metadata.description: Claude Code 公众号一键排版+发布技能 | Markdown → 微信兼容 HTML → 推送草稿箱 | 30 套主题 + 可视化画廊

summary.zh: 该仓库是面向 Claude Code 的微信公众号文章排版与发布技能，打通 Markdown 转微信兼容内联 HTML、主题预览选择、内容增强到草稿箱发布全流程。其亮点在于 30 套主题、可视化画廊、对话/金句/图组智能容器增强，以及自动上传图片到微信 CDN，适合内容团队、自媒体与技术写作场景。
summary.en: This repository provides a Claude Code skill for the complete WeChat Official Account publishing workflow, covering Markdown-to-WeChat-compatible inline HTML conversion, optional cover handling, theme selection, and draft publishing. Its key strengths include 30 built-in themes, a browser-based visual gallery, AI-driven enhancement for dialogues, quotes, and image groups, plus automated image upload to WeChat CDN. It is especially useful for creators, editorial teams, and technical writers targeting WeChat content distribution.

metadata.name: gemini-business2api
metadata.description: OpenAI-compatible API for Gemini Business with multi-account load balancing and multimodal capabilities (image/video generation, file parsing) | 将 Gemini Business 转为 OpenAI 兼容接口，支持多账户负载均衡及多模态能力（图像生成、视频生成、解析文件）

summary.zh: 该项目将 Gemini Business 封装为 OpenAI 兼容 API，便于现有聊天、Agent 与工作流系统零改造接入。它支持多账号轮询与故障切换、自动注册登录、文件解析、图像/视频生成及管理面板，适合个人研究多模态接入、中转服务与统一模型网关。
summary.en: Gemini Business2API turns Gemini Business into an OpenAI-compatible API, allowing existing chat apps, agents, and workflow tools to integrate with minimal changes. Its key strengths include multi-account rotation with failover, automated account registration and login, multimodal file parsing, image and video generation, streaming responses, and a built-in admin panel. It is well suited for personal research, unified model gateways, and multimodal access layers where OpenAI API compatibility and operational flexibility are critical.

metadata.name: gemini-skill
metadata.description: gemini drawing MCP & skill through browser, can be used in openclaw or any agent that supports MCP. Gemini画图 MCP和sill，支持龙虾或任何agent使用٩(๑>◡<๑)۶

summary.zh: 该项目以 MCP Server 封装 Gemini 网页版能力，借助 CDP 与浏览器守护进程实现生图、对话、图片上传/提取及会话管理自动化。其亮点在于标准 MCP 接口、Daemon 常驻复用、原图下载与自动去水印，适合 OpenClaw 等支持 MCP 的 Agent 快速接入 Gemini 图像与多模态能力。
summary.en: Gemini Skill wraps the Gemini web app as an MCP server, using CDP-driven browser automation and a daemonized runtime to support image generation, chat, image upload/extraction, and session management. Its key strengths are a standard MCP interface, persistent browser reuse, full-resolution image download, and automatic watermark removal. It is well suited for OpenClaw and any MCP-compatible agent that needs fast access to Gemini’s multimodal and image-generation capabilities.

metadata.name: paperclip
metadata.description: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies

summary.zh: Paperclip 是面向“零人力公司”的开源 AI 编排平台，以 Node.js 服务端与 React 控制台统一管理多代理团队。它支持接入 OpenClaw、Claude、Codex 等异构智能体，通过组织架构、预算治理、目标对齐与任务监控，让企业像管理团队一样持续驱动自动化研发、运营与增长。
summary.en: Paperclip is an open-source orchestration platform for building “zero-human companies.” Combining a Node.js backend with a React dashboard, it coordinates heterogeneous AI agents such as OpenClaw, Claude, Codex, Cursor, Bash, and HTTP workers under a single operating model. Beyond simple task management, it adds org charts, goal alignment, budget controls, governance, cost tracking, and auditability, making it suited for autonomous product building, operations, and always-on multi-agent business workflows.

metadata.name: douyin-upload-mcp-skill
metadata.description: 基于浏览器自动化的抖音视频/图文上传 MCP & Skill，适用于openclaw或任何支持skill，mcp的agent.  o(￣▽￣)ブ

summary.zh: 该项目通过 CDP 驱动 Chrome 自动操作抖音创作者平台，并以 MCP/Skill 形式对外提供视频与图文发布能力，适配 OpenClaw 等智能体。其亮点在于登录流程分阶段推进、独立 Daemon 托管浏览器生命周期、支持截图探测与会话复用，适合构建内容分发自动化与 AI Agent 发布链路。
summary.en: This repository provides an MCP/Skill-based automation service for publishing Douyin videos and image-text posts by controlling the creator platform through Chrome DevTools Protocol. It is designed for OpenClaw and other agents that support MCP or skill integration. Key strengths include staged login orchestration for QR code and SMS verification, a standalone daemon for browser lifecycle management, reusable browser sessions, and tool endpoints for probing, screenshots, navigation, and fully automated content publishing workflows.

metadata.name: MoneyPrinterV2
metadata.description: Automate the process of making money online.

summary.zh: MoneyPrinterV2 是一个基于 Python 3.12 的增长自动化工具，整合 Twitter 机器人、YouTube Shorts 批量生成发布、联盟营销与本地商家挖掘外联。其重写后的模块化架构结合定时调度与脚本化执行，适合内容变现、获客运营和自动化营销实验。
summary.en: MoneyPrinterV2 is a Python 3.12-based growth automation toolkit for online monetization workflows. It combines a Twitter bot, YouTube Shorts automation, affiliate marketing support, and local business discovery with cold outreach capabilities. Compared with the original version, V2 emphasizes a modular rewrite, scheduler-driven jobs, and scriptable access to core functions. It is best suited for creators, growth hackers, and indie operators who want to automate content publishing, lead generation, and experimental revenue funnels across social and outreach channels.

metadata.name: shanyin-screenwriting-master
metadata.description: 山音超级编剧大师——由 @山音 设计的全格式影视编剧技能。 覆盖从1-3分钟概念超短片到90分钟电影长片、多集剧集的全格式剧本创作。 支持四种格式：概念超短片（how-to-tell/what-if）、5-10分钟叙事短片、90分钟长片（商业/文艺）、多集剧集。 覆盖从人物设计、结构大纲、场景拆解、到完整剧本写作的全流程。

summary.zh: 这是一个面向影视创作的自然语言编剧 Agent Skill，支持概念超短片、叙事短片、90分钟长片与多集剧集四种格式。它覆盖人物设定、结构大纲、场景拆解到标准剧本输出的全流程，内置三幕式、英雄之旅及类型化框架，适合 AI 辅助编剧、短剧开发与电影项目孵化。
summary.en: Shanyin Screenwriting Master is a natural-language screenplay Agent Skill for end-to-end film and TV writing. It supports four major formats: concept micro-shorts, narrative shorts, 90-minute feature films, and multi-episode series. The skill covers the full creative pipeline, from character design and story structure to scene breakdowns and properly formatted scripts. With built-in frameworks such as the three-act structure, Hero’s Journey, and genre-specific plotting, it is well suited for AI-assisted screenwriting, short-form content development, and feature or series incubation workflows in tools like Claude and similar AI platforms.

metadata.name: TripStar
metadata.description: 旅途星辰 (TripStar)是一个创新的 AI 文旅智能体应用，旨在解决用户在规划旅行时面临的“信息过载”和“决策疲劳”问题。

summary.zh: TripStar 是基于 HelloAgents 的 AI 文旅规划平台，结合多智能体协作、LLM 推理与前后端分离架构，自动完成景点筛选、路线编排、预算测算、天气与酒店推荐。其亮点在于深度接入小红书与高德地图，支持预约提醒、知识图谱可视化和伴游问答，适合个性化国内旅行规划。
summary.en: TripStar is an AI travel-planning platform built on the HelloAgents framework, designed to reduce information overload and decision fatigue in trip preparation. It combines LLM-driven multi-agent orchestration with a Vue + FastAPI architecture to generate personalized itineraries, optimize routes, estimate budgets, and recommend hotels based on weather and user preferences. Key strengths include Xiaohongshu-powered attraction insights, AMap-based interactive routing, reservation reminders, knowledge-graph visualization, and contextual follow-up travel Q&A for immersive planning.

metadata.name: llmdoc
metadata.description: TokenRoll LLMDoc for Coding Agent

summary.zh: llmdoc 为 Claude Code 与 Codex 提供文档驱动开发流程，以精简技能、命令和插件骨架统一初始化与增量更新。它将调查、反思、架构与参考文档沉淀到可检索目录中，适用于需要持续保留项目知识、规范协作和降低提示词重复的 AI 编码场景。
summary.en: llmdoc is a documentation-driven workflow layer for Claude Code and Codex, designed to keep AI-assisted development stateful, consistent, and maintainable. It provides a compact public surface with init and update entrypoints, while moving detailed protocols, rationale, and templates into a structured skill system. The project focuses on turning investigations, reflections, architecture notes, and stable references into retrievable project memory. It is especially useful for teams or solo builders who want persistent knowledge capture, lower prompt duplication, and cleaner agent execution contracts during non-trivial coding work.

metadata.name: comfyui-workflow-skill
metadata.description: Natural language → ComfyUI workflow JSON. 34 built-in templates, 360+ node definitions, auto model download. Supports txt2img,       img2img, txt2vid, img2vid, audio, 3D generation across SD1.5/SDXL/SD3/FLUX/Wan2.2/HunyuanVideo/LTXV/Mochi/Cosmos + LLM integration.    Works as a skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI coding agents.

summary.zh: 该仓库把自然语言直接转换为可导入 ComfyUI 的工作流 JSON，面向 Claude Code、Cursor 等 AI 编码代理。其核心优势是内置 34 类模板、360+ 精确节点定义与模型自动下载，覆盖文生图、图生视频、音频、3D 和 LLM 编排，显著降低复杂多模态工作流搭建门槛。
summary.en: ComfyUI Workflow Skill turns natural-language requests into valid, import-ready ComfyUI workflow JSON files for Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI coding agents. Its main strengths are 34 built-in templates, 360+ accurately extracted node definitions, and automatic model download support through native workflow metadata. Covering txt2img, img2img, video, audio, 3D, and LLM-assisted pipelines across SD, FLUX, Wan, HunyuanVideo, and more, it dramatically reduces the effort of building complex multimodal ComfyUI graphs by hand.

metadata.name: desktop-cc-gui
metadata.description: CC GUI 客户端（专为开发者打造的VibeCoding平台）

summary.zh: ccgui 是面向专业开发者的开源 AI 编码桌面工作台，基于 Tauri 打造，集成 Claude Code、Codex CLI、OpenCode 等多引擎统一管理。除聊天外，还提供终端、Git、看板、任务规划、项目记忆与 MCP 支持，适合构建透明、可扩展的下一代 VibeCoding 开发环境。
summary.en: ccgui is an open-source AI coding desktop workbench for professional developers, positioned as a transparent alternative to Cursor. Built with Tauri, it unifies multiple engines such as Claude Code, Codex CLI, and OpenCode in one interface. Beyond chat, it includes a terminal, Git panel, kanban board, planning tools, project memory, and MCP server support, making it well suited for extensible, cross-platform VibeCoding workflows and advanced AI-assisted software development.

metadata.name: hermes-agent
metadata.description: The agent that grows with you

summary.zh: Hermes Agent 是 Nous Research 打造的自进化 AI 代理，核心在内建学习闭环：可从任务经验生成并迭代技能、沉淀长期记忆、检索跨会话历史并建模用户画像。它支持多模型无锁定切换、多平台消息接入、定时自动化与子代理并行，且可运行于本地、VPS、容器或无服务器环境。
summary.en: Hermes Agent is a self-improving AI agent from Nous Research designed for persistent, multi-session assistance. Its standout feature is a built-in learning loop: it creates skills from experience, refines them during execution, stores long-term memory, searches past conversations, and models the user over time. The system supports model-agnostic routing, multi-channel messaging, scheduled automations, and parallel subagents, while running across local machines, VPS deployments, containers, and low-idle-cost serverless backends.

metadata.name: she-love-me
metadata.description: 她不一样   恋情分析室 — 微信聊天记录恋爱分析 Agent Skill  （曾用名：她爱我吗？）

summary.zh: 这是一个面向微信/QQ 聊天记录的本地恋爱分析 Agent Skill，可自动解密导出数据，结合依恋类型、Gottman 与 Sternberg 等心理学框架，生成主动度、冷淡度、风险预警和关系建议报告，适用于情感复盘、关系判断与沟通策略分析。
summary.en: She-love-me is a local-first Agent Skill for analyzing romantic dynamics from WeChat and QQ chat histories. It can decrypt or extract records, quantify interaction patterns such as initiative, affection, coldness, and conversational power, and produce structured reports with charts and recommendations. The project combines psychological models including attachment styles, Gottman methods, and Sternberg’s triangle, while using layered sampling to reduce LLM hallucination and keep conclusions traceable, private, and practical for relationship review, emotional risk detection, and communication strategy planning.

metadata.name: graphify
metadata.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI, OpenClaw, Factory Droid, Trae, Google Antigravity). Turn any folder of code, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph

summary.zh: graphify 是面向 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手的知识图谱技能，可将代码、文档、论文、图片、音视频统一解析为可查询图谱。其结合 AST 静态分析、Whisper 转录、Claude 并行抽取与 Leiden 聚类，无需向量库即可揭示架构关系、设计动机与跨模态关联，并以可视化图、审计报告和持久化 JSON 交付。
summary.en: graphify is a knowledge-graph skill for AI coding assistants such as Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Copilot CLI. It turns folders of code, docs, papers, images, audio, and video into a persistent, queryable graph. The pipeline combines deterministic tree-sitter AST analysis, local Whisper transcription, parallel Claude-based concept extraction, and Leiden community detection. Instead of relying on embeddings or a vector database, it uses graph topology and typed relations to expose architecture, rationale, and hidden cross-modal links through interactive HTML, audit reports, and reusable JSON output.

metadata.name: UZI-Skill
metadata.description: 冰冷的钱就这样流进我温暖的口袋-游资（UZI）Skills — 51位投资大佬帮你看盘 · 22维数据 × 180条量化规则 × 17种机构分析方法 · A股/港股/美股

summary.zh: UZI-Skill 是面向 A股、港股、美股的 AI 个股深度分析技能，以 Python 构建，整合 22 维市场与基本面数据、180 条量化规则和 17 种机构分析框架，结合 51 位投资风格评审生成长篇 HTML 报告、图片战报与摘要。其亮点是免费数据源、零 API Key、多 Agent 兼容及可离线交付。
summary.en: UZI-Skill is an AI-powered stock deep-analysis skill for China A-shares, Hong Kong, and U.S. equities. Built with Python, it combines 22 data dimensions, 180 quantitative rules, 17 institutional research frameworks, and scoring from 51 investor personas to generate Bloomberg-style HTML reports, shareable images, and concise summaries. Key strengths include free data sources, zero API-key setup, compatibility with multiple AI agents such as Claude Code and Codex, and self-contained offline-readable outputs for practical retail and semi-professional research workflows.

metadata.name: open-codex-computer-use
metadata.description: 👾 Open Computer Use – Open-Source Alternative to Codex Computer Use

summary.zh: open-computer-use 是面向 macOS 的开源 Computer Use 服务，通过 MCP 向 AI 代理暴露屏幕理解与系统交互能力。它基于辅助功能与屏幕录制权限实现非侵入式自动化，支持 Claude Code、Codex 等客户端，并提供可复用的光标运动系统与命令行集成。
summary.en: open-computer-use is an open-source Computer Use service for macOS that exposes GUI interaction capabilities through MCP, allowing AI agents and MCP clients to control applications directly. Built on macOS Accessibility and Screen Recording rather than intrusive system hooks, it enables non-invasive desktop automation inspired by Codex Computer Use. The project includes CLI tooling for direct calls, MCP installation helpers for Claude Code and Codex, and an open-source cursor motion subsystem, making it a practical foundation for agentic desktop control and UI automation workflows.

summary.zh: EasySDD 是面向 AI 辅助开发的轻量工作流框架，以 feature/issue/knowledge 三类技能形成“设计—实现—验收—沉淀”闭环。它通过统一目录、YAML checklist、术语归一与架构同步更新，解决范围失控、经验遗失和文档脱节问题，适合持续演进型代码仓库。
summary.en: EasySDD is a lightweight workflow framework for AI-assisted software development, built around a closed loop of feature delivery, issue fixing, and knowledge accumulation. Instead of letting models jump straight into coding, it enforces staged specs, human checkpoints, YAML-based checklists, and a shared documentation structure. Its key strength is turning each task’s output into reusable input for future design and debugging, while keeping requirements, architecture, and feature docs aligned with the codebase over time.
